Name: DraftKings Inc.
Description:
It's simple, we believe life is more fun when you're in on the action. For that reason, we’re committed to responsibly creating the world’s favorite games and betting experiences.

At DraftKings, The Crown Is Yours. 

We are driven by the thrill of the future and the pull of possibility. As an original, continuous gamechanger, we’re shaping the present and future of sports entertainment and digital experiences, leading the way into new markets with new products, and providing the ultimate experience to our customers. 

Here, we believe in the power and impact that comes from innovation, collaboration, and a winning culture. We’re a strong and dedicated global team of 4,000+ teammates driven to achieve great things. From your very first day, you’ll be part of an amazing culture that welcomes your ideas, champions your growth, and values you for you. 

Ready to own what’s next?

Name: Wildlife Studios
Description:
Wildlife is a leading mobile gaming company based in São Paulo, Brazil. Our games have been downloaded over 4.5 billion times globally and we are one of the top mobile game developers and publishers in the world. Wildlife's portfolio includes hit games such as Racing Penguin, Bike Race, Sniper 3d, Zooba, Tennis Clash, War Machines, Color by Number & Midas Merge.  

Global, diversified, and backed by top-tier investment firms, our 500+ employees are located in our offices in Brazil, the United States and Helsinki.

We believe in games that are free-to-play and played on smartphones – the largest and fastest growing platform. 

Join us on our journey to create unforgettable gaming experiences. Discover more about our projects, company culture, and career opportunities on our website.

Name: Rooter.gg
Description: We are building a category-defining platform at the intersection of mobile gaming and creator-led commerce in India. With a compelling dual-platform model — our foundation in Game streaming and our recently launched in-game purchase marketplace — we boast 85 Mn+ registered users spending 20 mins every day on the platform. Today, we are building one of the most robust Gaming ecosystems in the country - connecting ardent Gamers, passionate creators, esports professionals, brands, and gaming publishers with each other. In the course of our journey, we've raised USD 37 Mn in primary capital from a marquee investor base spread across India, US, Europe, and Southeast Asia.

Name: Funsol Technologies (Pvt). Ltd
Description: Quality Content Creators in Mobile Gaming & Mobile Apps | More than 500M users around the globe | Innovative Technologies Hub | Dynamic organisational structure & career growth for tech potential around the town.

Name: Tamatem Games
Description:
Tamatem is the leading mobile games publisher in the Arabic speaking market. We partner with international studios and developers, to localize and make their games culturally relevant for the Arab gamer.

Our experience in localization, user acquisition, distribution, cross-promotion, monetization, community, support and whales management we can help get your game on the top of charts, increase revenue and ensure its success in the Arabic market. Whether you are looking to publish a newly successful international game or trying to revive an old hit title, Tamatem is your best partner. We focus on publishing MMO-RPG, strategy, builder, mid-core, SLG, puzzle and trivia games.

Tamatem has published over 50 games on both iOS and Android with over 150M downloads. Tamatem is a 500 Startups and Endeavor company with offices in Amman, Jordan.

Name: Head Digital Works
Description:
We are one of India's oldest online skill-gaming companies that develop and operate zeal-driven applications for online gaming enthusiasts. With over 80 million users and multiple brand verticals like A23 Rummy, A23 Poker, and Adda52, Head Digital Works has come a long way in the past 19 years. What started from a small garage in 2006 with nothing but a dream - "To become India's leading online gaming platform" has now turned into one of the premier skilled-gaming companies in India.

We're a diverse group of thinkers and doers who are reimagining what's possible to make it easier for all of us to do what we love in new ways.

Name: Homa
Description: Homa is a gaming technology lab that gives game creators the data-driven tools and human expertise needed to turn their creative ideas into commercial hits. By smashing the odds with data, Homa is the cheat code supercharging developer fortunes. It’s a full-on game changer for game makers.

Name: CrazyLabs
Description:
Welcome to the official CrazyLabs page! If you’ve ever lost track of time playing a mobile game, there’s a statistically high chance we’re the ones to blame . 


CrazyLabs is a top casual and hybrid-casual mobile games developer and publisher, with over 7 billion downloads and over 10 years of experience.

We are a team of a unique blend of 30+ nationalities, working together and being truly connected. And all of us believe that if we aren’t having fun making it, you won't have fun playing it.

Join the lab, follow the page for behind the scenes of our Crazy world.

Name: Nordeus
Description:
Let’s travel back to 2010 for a minute. Nordeus started with three friends, who came back from Copenhagen to make their childhood dreams come true in Serbia. They combined their love for football and gaming, and Nordeus was born. But let’s fast forward to today, with more than 280 individually amazing people working at Nordeus, powering mobile sports games enjoyed by players in every country on Earth. 

Football management is all about love and passion for football. Our game Top Eleven, launched in 2010, lets you create and manage your club to compete against opponents worldwide. With over 300 million registered users today, it's the most successful mobile football management game.

Thanks to the proven decade-long success with Top Eleven, we took Golf Rival under our wing as part of Take-Two Interactive Software and Zynga companies.

When we are not scoring goals on the football pitch or delivering the next big 3D update in Top Eleven,  we are creating a better future for generations to come.
Nordeus Foundation, launched in 2021, is focused on helping children acquire skills and knowledge needed to win in the digital economy by supporting education in Serbia and developing a stimulating and creative environment.

On a mission to drive digital innovation in Serbia and put the country on the global gaming map, we co-founded non-government organizations to help usher in the next generation of tech-first entrepreneurs and gaming enthusiasts:
- Digital Serbia Initiative - with the strategic goal of developing a strong, globally competitive digital economy
- Serbian Games Association - to support Serbia’s video games sector’s growth and enhance its ability to compete globally.

In short, we are part of something bigger than a job. 

If you want to experience the unique feeling of directly creating and impacting sports mobile games that touch lives of millions worldwide, you know what to do- join us!

Name: High 5 Games
Description:
High 5 Games is laser-focused on making an impression through innovative casino content for the land-based, mobile, online, and social markets. With a collection of over 500 casino slot games, its own full casino platforms, and a strong history of entertaining players, the casino technology company is highly respected in the B2C and B2B social and online gaming worlds. H5G holds licenses and game certifications in multiple jurisdictions around the globe.

H5G’s world-renowned and fast-expanding slot games portfolio has grown to over 500+ diverse games. The H5G software offers dynamic and distinct styles players cannot resist. Each game is designed to offer a unique experience to the gamer, taking the production to the next level with every newly released game. H5G has become the industry’s leading content provider with its classic games and continuing production of slot titles with unique experiences. 

H5G also operates High 5 Casino, the premier destination for the most robust and largest slot content library in the social casino category with nearly 17 million players worldwide. In 2012, the social casino app launched with only 30 slots. It has since become an extremely popular game with over 400+ slots for players to browse and play. In 2020, High 5 Casino expanded its reach, with the company launching the app into the real-money market. The in-house casino platform will feature a full list of the company’s original games, as well as integrating popular promotions, third-party games from well-known content providers, and a one-of-a-kind experience.
 
To find out more about High 5 Games, please visit www.high5games.com or contact Sales@high5games.com. 

Regulated by Malta Gaming Authority under licence number MGA/B2B/545/2018

Gambling can be addictive - Play responsibly - 18+/21+ (U.S)

Name: Game District
Description: Game District is an emerging Mobile Games Leader with One Billion+ Games Downloads and is trusted by the Biggest companies like NFL, Hobbits, LEGO, and Outfit7. We believe in making outstanding & engaging games that take the market by storm. Specializing in Casual, Rpg, Mid core, and Hyper casual games. Game District also provides developers support to take the project to miles, and incorporate digital tools to make the maximum revenues.

Name: OZI Publishing
Description:
We are largest Mobile Content Publisher of Pakistan with 100 million monthly active users. At OZI Technology, we develop various system of products that satisfy different needs, ensuring useful and meaningful experiences for every minute spent in online space. Our understanding of mobile and web based technology empowers us to bring a level of expertise like no one else.
We deal in:
1. Mobile Apps
2. Mobile Games
3. Client Services

Name: Glu Mobile
Description: EA Mobile is home to developers working on iconic franchises such as Plants vs. Zombies, Design Home, Star Wars, Sim City, Golf Clash, Pogo, and more. At EA Mobile, we value creativity, continuous learning, data-driven decision-making, and strong product knowledge. We are looking for passionate individuals who thrive in a growth-oriented environment and are committed to collaborating in dynamic teams to deliver compelling experiences to millions of players worldwide.

Name: Mindstorm Studios
Description:
WE ARE HIRING (https://mindstormstudios.simplicant.com/)

We bring fun to life on the mobile with games that entertain millions all around the world.

With over 15 years of game development experience and hits in the bag, including critically acclaimed PC titles like Cricket Revolution and the ICC 2011 official world cup cricket game, Cricket Power, we are now focused on disrupting the mobile casual and hypercasual markets with world class game launches and experiences.

We are partnered with the top publishers in the mobile gaming world and are leading the charge to make Pakistan a mobile gaming powerhouse!

Name: Socialpoint
Description:
Socialpoint is a world-renowned game developer and publisher, specializing in mobile gaming. Ever heard of Dragon City, Monster Legends, or Top Troops? That’s us! Our egg hatched in 2008, and we’ve been connecting the world through awesome gameplay ever since. 

We know that key to our success are the brilliant minds and the talent of our team players. Our international team is formed by awesome people who are passionate about social games, creativity, and pushing the bar. 

We offer a fun, lively, and dynamic workplace, headquartered in beautiful Barcelona, where creativity, agility and innovation are encouraged, prized and rewarded. Working with us will see you develop your skills, play drive your career and delight 2 millions daily active users around the world!

Have you got game? jobs@socialpoint.es, www.socialpoint.es/jobs

Name: Appcharge
Description:
Appcharge is the fastest-growing mobile game payments platform, led by veterans from Moon Active, Rovio, Huuuuge Games, Playtika and PlayStudios.

As an all-in-one platform, we provide everything game publishers need to sell direct to players; fully branded web stores, gamified offers, global payments checkout, mobile in-app-payments SDKs and more.

We are your Merchant of Record: Appcharge supports 500 payment methods, 80 currencies, and makes partners financially compliant worldwide in minutes. 

Headquartered in Tel Aviv, we are funded by IVP, Creandum, Play Ventures, Gillot Capital, Bitkraft, Supercell, Playrix, Smilegate and more.

Industry-Recognized Excellence

Best Payment Service Provider — Pocket Gamer Mobile Games Awards (2024 & 2025)
Game Changer 2026 — GamesBeat × Lightspeed × Nasdaq (Top 25 Gaming Startups)

Name: Supersonic from Unity
Description: Mobile game publisher, part of the Unity solutions portfolio

Name: Huuuge Games
Description:
Huuuge is an international free-to-play games developer and a global publisher of digital games on mobile and web platforms, with a mission to empower billions of people to play together, as part of the Huuuge vision to transform mobile gaming into a massively social experience. 

In order to continue building one of the global leaders in real-time, free-to-play mobile gaming, Huuuge aims to redefine the user experience by offering best-in-class live operations and innovative social features in its games.

Huuuge is one of the fastest-growing mobile game developers, having generated annual consolidated revenue growth of 30.6% in the period between 2017 and 2019 (CAGR). The Company develops and publishes its games globally and its users play its games in almost every country in the world.

Huuuge’s major areas of operations are development and publishing. Development encompasses all activities related to the development of new games. Huuuge has a proven track record of developing successful games within the social casino subgenre through its systematic development process. Publishing encompasses activities from the launch of a game onwards, including relationship building with distributors, marketing and continuous post-launch game optimization.

As of September 30, 2020 Huuuge had 4.74 million Monthly Active Users (“MAU”) compared to 3.98 million, 3.72 million and 3.32 million as at calendar year end 2019, 2018 and 2017, respectively.

Name: Cympl Studios
Description:
Welcome to Cympl Studios, a leading mobile game development and publishing studio! Over the years, we have established ourselves as a prominent name in the gaming industry, dedicated to making casual mobile games more immersive, engaging, and most importantly, fun. Our journey has been marked by a diverse portfolio that spans various genres, from time management classics to the nostalgia-inducing board games that we all love.

Cympl Studios is embarking on a new adventure in the world of gaming and is now delving into the exciting realm of hybrid casual genre games. As a studio known for its commitment to excellence, we aim to carry our legacy of building high-quality casual and engaging games into this new territory. Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to create games that can be enjoyed by players of all ages and backgrounds around the world.

At Cympl Studios, we are proud of our remote teams who consistently deliver exceptional art and engineer thrilling gameplay experiences. This blend of creativity, innovation, and collaboration defines our approach to game development.

Join us on this exciting journey as we venture into the world of hybrid casual games. Together, we'll continue to push the boundaries of mobile gaming and create experiences that resonate with players worldwide. Stay tuned for the exciting games and adventures that lie ahead!

Name: Zapplogics Solutions
Description: Zapplogics Solutions and our group of companies have 15 years of experience in IT services. We create software applications and mobile apps designed to help clients globally maximize their technology's potential.

Name: Ace Games
Description:
Ace Games is a mobile gaming company with a vision to make games that are played by everyone around the world.

In the heart of Istanbul, the capital of mobile gaming, we are set to build genre-defining games.

To achieve our goal, we keep building a young, talented, dedicated team and creating the best environment to realize its potential.

Name: Toca Boca
Description:
Play is in our DNA. At Toca Boca we make playful, safe spaces where kids can have fun and feel free to be themselves. Today, over 60 million kids from all over the world play our games every single month. Our award-winning app Toca Boca World is our biggest game to date. It’s an ever-evolving world where kids are in total control. And we're launching our first multiplayer game, Toca Boca Days, in select markets through 2024.

Toca Boca is based in Stockholm, and owned by Spin Master, a leading global kid’s entertainment company creating exceptional play experiences through a diverse portfolio of innovative toys, entertainment franchises and digital games.

Name: SYBO
Description:
Based in Copenhagen, SYBO is a mobile games studio founded in 2010 and best known for its hit endless runner game, Subway Surfers.

As the most downloaded game of all time, Subway Surfers surpassed over 4 billion lifetime downloads in early 2023. In addition to its flagship Subway Surfers game, SYBO has launched game titles, including Subway Surfers Blast, Subway Surfers Tag, Subway Surfers Match, and Blades of Brim.

Name: Mayhem Studios
Description:
We are gamers and we love games. We want to build stories, characters, narratives and worlds that gamers will love for decades to come. 

Strap yourself tight because we’re on a rocketship to gaming paradise, fuelled by Mayhem.

Name: Paxie Games
Description:
Founded in 2021, Paxie Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies, reaching millions of players worldwide. Our mission is to deliver the most engaging and optimized gaming experiences by leveraging data insights and constant A/B testing to deeply understand player needs. At Paxie Games, we don’t just create games—we build the technology our teams need to successfully maintain and evolve them over the years, ensuring each department has the tools required to work efficiently and keep our games thriving.

With our talented team and a relentless drive for innovation, we continuously push the boundaries of quality, delivering high-impact experiences that captivate more players every day.

Name: Hypemasters
Description: Hypemasters is an international game development studio with HQ in the US & offices in Europe & the UAE. We are on a mission to build the top mid-core PvP gaming company in the world, one that disrupts and defines gaming genres.

Name: NextBigGames
Description:
Welcome to NextBigGames, where we forecast the future of gaming and offer ideation services for game studios. Our mission is simple: to identify upcoming hits and trends before they go mainstream. With deep dives into market analysis and player behavior, we're here to ensure you're always one step ahead.What We Offer:

1) Trend Forecasting: Predicting the next game changers.
2) Ideation Workshops: Sparking creativity for your next project.
3) Market Insights: Key data on what players want.
4) Development Consulting: Expert advice to captivate your audience.

NextBigGames is for developers, publishers, and enthusiasts looking for the edge in a fast-evolving industry. Stay ahead with us. Follow for the latest in gaming innovation and insights.Let's innovate the future of gaming together.

Name: Finz Games
Description:
Finz Games is a mobile game development and publishing studio behind some of the most played and loved titles across the globe. Our games have reached over 1 billion downloads, driven by a strong focus on accessible, addictive experiences—especially in the hyper-casual and sports and fighting categories..

We build easy-to-play games that spark curiosity and reward quick thinking, backed by a team of over 130 professionals working across design, development, publishing, and marketing.

Our culture is built around experimentation, speed, and smart scaling. We’ve deeply integrated artificial intelligence across our workflows—from prototyping to monetization—making our development pipeline faster and more creative. Our innovations have caught the attention of global platforms and industry leaders, earning recognition on some of the biggest international stages.

Finz Games is also committed to empowering talent. We invest in people, mentor emerging leaders, and form collaborations that push the boundaries of what’s possible in mobile gaming. As we continue to grow, we remain focused on making games that entertain, inspire, and scale globally.

If you’re passionate about games, growth, and creative technology—we’d love to connect.

Name: Azur Games
Description:
Azur Games is an international mobile game developer and publisher.

We are currently Top 1 mobile worldwide publishers by downloads — in 2025, we’ve surpassed the 10 billion download mark. Our portfolio has more than 150 high-performing projects in various game genres: from midcore pvp to hyper casual.

The Azur Games team consists of gifted professionals working remotely and from our offices all over the world. Together, we’re doing everything to make sure talented game developers see their projects at the top of the charts.

Let’s AZUR together

Name: Panteon
Description: Panteon’s journey began in 2012, with the dream of creating the ultimate mobile gaming experience. Our data-driven approach and know-how about games let us to reach millions of players.

Name: Lads Technologies
Description:
Lads Technologies is a leading company in the mobile application industry, focusing on creating innovative and engaging gaming experiences. With a team of 300 talented employees, we are dedicated to developing cutting-edge games that captivate players across various platforms. Our expertise lies in designing and developing mobile applications that combine stunning visuals, immersive gameplay, and intuitive controls. Our commitment to excellence has attracted a strong network of professionals, as reflected by our 73 members on LinkedIn, who proudly list Lads Technologies as their current employer.

 Exceptional Digital Experiences

 Customized Software Solutions

Name: Afterverse
Description:
Afterverse is a game company from the Movile group and we believe that technology with attitude changes the world. We create unforgettable games for generations and break social and cultural barriers. There are more than 50 million people playing in more than 14 countries around the world. That is, no matter where you are, the different universes will make you have fun, connect and be inspired. 

In our great success, PK XD, join millions of people around the world. In this open world, imagination is in charge. Customize your avatar, build your dream home and get ready to live epic adventures with your friends and virtual pets. 

In Crafty Lands, create your own blocky universe! It is a perfect game to explore different worlds and build everything you can imagine. Along the way, you will meet characters, pets, construction tools and even be able to fly between different scenarios. 

How about building incredible universes too? Access the careers page to stay on top of all opportunities and Instagram (@ afterverse.official) to learn more about our universe.

Name: Nanobit
Description:
We are an award-winning global game development studio based in Zagreb, Croatia with a worldwide reach of millions of players across countries and languages.

Founded in 2008 by two young programers, Nanobit has since grown to mark its 12-year journey with stunning achievements and results. To date, our games have amassed over 185 million downloads and our vibrant community has reached 10 million monthly active players!

We are proud to rank among Croatia’s top tech companies and twice make the Financial Times list of FT 1000: Europe’s Fastest-Growing Companies. Winner of Best Employer in Croatia Award in 2014, our reputation for providing great working conditions precedes us: we support our employees' professional development through continuous learning and opportunities to attend worldwide conferences and workshops.

Today, our team of over 150 experts are of diverse backgrounds and areas of expertise: art, design, mathematics, writing, content creation, programming and engineering – all driven by one unwavering mission: To put extra into ordinary. Together, we are not just developing super fun games, but also creating immersive experiences for our players across the world.

Interested to join and grow along with us? 
Check out our careers page at: https://nanobit.talentlyft.com/

Name: NaturalMotion Games
Description:
Our goal is to wow people with creativity and technology. We like making stuff that seems impossible. The thrill of achieving this together in a team – and seeing the result played by millions is what makes us tick. Our hit games include CSR Racing 2, Dawn of Titans and Star Wars: Hunters.

NaturalMotion was founded in 2001. For the past seven consecutive years (2018 - 2024), NaturalMotion studios have been listed as one of the Best Places To Work in the UK video games industry, at the Gamesindustry.biz Awards.

NaturalMotion is proud to be a Zynga studio. Zynga is a global leader in interactive entertainment with a mission to connect the world through games and a wholly-owned subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. With massive global reach in more than 175 countries and regions, Zynga has a diverse portfolio of popular game franchises that have been downloaded more than four billion times on mobile including CSR Racing, Empires & Puzzles, FarmVille, Golf Rival, Hair Challenge, Harry Potter: Puzzles & Spells, High Heels!, Merge Dragons!, Merge Magic!, Toon Blast, Toy Blast, Words With Friends and Zynga Poker. With Chartboost, a leading mobile advertising and monetization platform, Zynga is an industry-leading next-generation platform with the ability to optimize programmatic advertising and yields at scale. Founded in 2007, Zynga is headquartered in California with locations in North America, Europe and Asia.

Name: Tapjoy (Acquired by ironSource)
Description:
Tapjoy is revolutionizing the mobile advertising and app monetization industry. 
We work with Brand Advertisers to help them reach their ideal mobile audience through rewarded video ads and our offerwall. We work with Publishers to help them acquire new users and monetize their mobile apps.

Founded in 2007 and headquartered in San Francisco, Tapjoy is a global organization with more than a dozen offices worldwide. Our SDK is currently embedded in over 30,000 mobile apps and reaches over 800 million active users per month. Headquartered in San Francisco, we have offices in Los Angeles, Santa Barbara, Chicago, Boston, New York, London, Seoul, Tokyo, and Beijing.

https://twitter.com/tapjoy
https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/tapjoy
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJnrnlL7BpwBGMCDekMTGtw

Name: Tactile Games
Description:
It’s an exciting time to join Tactile. Our story began in 2008 in the heart of the beautiful Copenhagen, and since then we have experienced continuous growth, establishing ourselves as one of the largest gaming companies in Denmark. In more recent years, we have been scaling fast, in big part thanks to the success of a little game called Lily’s Garden. Now we’re on a mission to solidify our position as one of the leaders in creating out-of-the-ordinary casual puzzle games.

With more than 350 talented individuals, we are a mix of over 50 nationalities and 40% women. We truly appreciate the richness of different experiences and perspectives that Tactilers bring to the game. This is why we foster a lean organisational culture, in which each individual is encouraged to take responsibility, be open and grow in their own way. We pride ourselves in cultivating a studio environment that stays away from crunch, that fosters your skills no matter what your discipline is, and one that gives you a place to be creative alongside other passionate and invested storytellers.

The simple act of walking is good for our bodies, our minds, and the planet. It tackles global issues such as sedentary lifestyles and pollution. It fosters empathy and belonging, and brings us back in touch with each other and our surroundings. But its immense value has been overlooked and under-appreciated. 

We’re making walking a more rewarding part of our lives, because a walking world is a world in balance.

Name: Lumi Interactive
Description:
At Lumi Interactive we're building a new category of wellbeing games for Gen Z and millennial women.

Kinder World is our first step, a mobile game combining wellbeing-focused exercises with nurturing gameplay. Still in alpha, Kinder World can be downloaded at www.lumiinteractive.com or iOS or Android.

Unlike more traditional games, Kinder World is designed for shorter play sessions in the morning and the evening, streamlined and accessible for on-the-go emotional regulation.

Designed for creativity, players are able to grow completely unique houseplants (thanks to a custom growth algorithm) by taking care of themselves and supporting others. Rewards include decorative items, personal spaces to design, new plant species and more ways to motivate others through ‘Kind Wish‘ messages in the game.

The social element in Kinder World is also unlike any other social network or game community. It has the explicit goal of bringing people together to spread kindness to each other. Lumi’s goal is that through being kind to yourself and being kind to others, we’ll eventually build a kinder world together.

Name: Playfinity
Description:
Playfinity assembled in 2016 to become a force for good - realizing the global crisis on play, the decline in sports participation, and the growing physical and mental health concerns amongst children.

We're developing products, technology, and experiences that inspire, motivate, and connect children, coaches, parents, families, friends, and teammates around the world - providing new ways to discover, play, compete, and have fun together based on the sports they love.

Our ambition at Playfinity is to be the category leader in an emerging real-world gaming segment - combining gaming, sports, and physical activity in new and innovative ways.  

Putting the player in the center of the physical game - we’ve created fully-immersive experiences, with sound effects, music and live commentary - play by play.

The experiences that we create are built on our proprietary playOS platform combining sensors and mobile technology. playOS is designed as a system for repeatable development, allowing us to scale faster and cheaper for every new sport. Through this we’re targeting the 1.5+ Billion people playing sports, the $173B gaming industry, and the $388B sports industry.

Through partnerships in 2020 we launched Jump Games in Europe and in 2021 we followed up with Jump League in Australia - both trampoline inspired. 

In Fall of 2021 we launched the Backyard League Gaming Baseball in the United States, appealing to 24+ million players, 96% of whom are kids between the ages of 6-14 years. In the 2 months post-launch the Gaming Baseball earned #1 status for the holiday on Amazon Launchpad and was featured in Newsweek as the #2 technology gift for the holiday 2021.

Join Team Playfinity on our mission to impact millions of lives in youth sports!

In SuprHuman, players are not just gamers; they are change-makers. Through a revolutionary Play-to-Earn model, every action taken within the game contributes to positive change in the world. Whether it's tackling environmental challenges, providing aid in disaster-stricken areas, or fostering community growth, each mission completed leaves a tangible impact on humanity.

Built on Web3 principles, SuprHuman ensures transparency, security, and decentralization. The blockchain backbone enables seamless transactions of in-game assets and tokens while verifying that every contribution to real-world causes is traceable and authentic.

SuprHuman offers a dynamic landscape of missions designed to test players' skills, wit, and empathy. By joining forces with fellow gamers, you’ll embark on thrilling adventures that challenge you to think strategically and act compassionately. From planting trees and aiding disaster relief efforts to promoting community engagement, the quests in SuprHuman are as meaningful as they are exciting.

As you progress through the game, earning tokens and mastering challenges, you’ll not only enhance your virtual prowess but also make a tangible difference in the world. The power to create change lies in your hands, and SuprHuman provides the platform to channel that power for the greater good.

Gear up, dive into the world of SuprHuman, and let’s game our way to a brighter, better tomorrow together!

Name: PSV Game Studio
Description:
Ми, компанія PSV Game Studio, займаємося розробкою мобільних ігор. Наша компанія є одним із лідерів міжнародного ринку в сегменті мобільних ігор для дітей дошкільного та молодшого шкільного віку. Ми входимо в ТОП-50 розробників мобільних ігор у всьому світі. Кількість завантажень наших ігор становить більш ніж 1 мільярд.

На ігровому ринку ми вже 10 років, починаючи з 2014 року. За цей час ми створили більше ніж 250 ігор для Android та iOS і переклали їх на 14 мов. У нас є власний бренд Hippo, й також безліч брендованих ігор (Hello Kitty, L.O.L. Surprise!, Winx Club, The Adventures of Mansour, Vlad and Niki).

Ми створили медіаційний SDK і сервіс CAS.AI (Clever Ads Solutions). Понад 8 тисяч застосунків є клієнтами нашої медіаційної платформи для рекламної монетизації. Ми також виступаємо як паблішери для інших компаній та розробників.

Ми створюємо нові продукти, спілкуємось та знаходимо нових партнерів, рухаємося тільки вперед. Наша основна мета — розробка високоякісного сімейного контенту для мобільних платформ Android та iOS, внесок в ігрову індустрію та розвиток компанії.

- Innovation: We continuously invest in cutting-edge technology, including AI, machine learning, and immersive VR/AR experiences, to enhance the way users interact with our platform and each other.

At Roblox, we embrace a culture of innovation, inclusivity, and collaboration. Our diverse team of passionate professionals is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in interactive entertainment. We value creativity, initiative, and the drive to make a positive impact on the world through play.

Name: Creative Monkey Games & Technologies Private Limited
Description:
Creative Monkey Games & Technologies Private Limited founded in 2014 is a leading global developer and publisher of free-to-play games for the major mobile platforms such as Android, iOS and Windows. We understand the global gaming market and create innovative games to entertain our players. We are experts in visualizing the game scope across-the-board and transform it into addictive games.

OUR VISION
We wanted to change the way what gaming is today. Rather than making games just to entertain people, we wanted to transform our games into a medium of information, education and health care.

SERVICES

1. CLIENT GAMES
We work with Clients to bring their ideas into a complete game with features such as global/friends leader board, in-game achievements, in-app purchases and social network sharing to enhance user experience.  All our games are designed to suit various form factors - phones, tablets, iPads & iPods. We build games using industry standard middleware like Unity3D to provide fully native implementations, depending on the objectives. Our team covers the entire life cycle of a game from inception to release. 

2. GAMIFICATION
Gamification is a business strategy which applies game design techniques to non-game contexts to drive user behavior. Video games are the dominant entertainment form of modern times because they powerfully motivate behavior. Game mechanics can be applied outside the immersive environments of games themselves, to create engaging experiences as well as assign rewards and recognition. 

3. BRAND SPECIFIC GAMES
We focus on developing mobile games for brands to offer an addictive digital medium to reach out to a global audience. With the right format, businesses can advertise their products, improve brand recognition, increase reach and engage with the customers directly. Unlike most communications platforms, players get to experience brand’s values and messages in an entertaining, non-intrusive and interactive way.

Нам нужен твой талант, чтобы делать наши игры еще круче!

Name: VLTED
Description:
In today's corporate landscape, employee turnover and dissociation is at an all-time high and creating lasting bonds with coworkers is harder than ever before. A 2025 Gallup study showed 51% of employees are actively seeking a new job, while 69% of employees are disengaged. This lack of motivation and connection has cost around $8.9 trillion annually (~9% of global GDP) in a combination of turnover, opportunity cost, and a lack of productivity.

This is where VLTED comes in. VLTED is a new, revolutionary platform for employee recognition and team building that bridges the gap between employers and employees no matter when or where they work. We help teams foster a strong sense of belonging and connection while boosting morale by empowering managers to create friendly competitions, launch interactive polls, encourage content sharing, and reward employees, all while tracking engagement and performance through leaderboards from the comfort of their favorite desk chair - anywhere.

We're a privately owned and funded company dedicated to doing good. We're creating risk-free space for all people to compete, converse, and be heard.

At VLTED, we believe in:

1. COMMUNITY Not only do we bring people together using our in-app communities, we also create a sense of community amongst those we work with. We're a team and we've got each others' backs.

2. AUTHENTICITY At VLTED, every employee is valued for their individual strengths and the skills they bring to the table. Personalities and passions are celebrated and individuality is uplifted.

3. PASSION We stand firm in our belief in our product and the nationwide impact it will have within the sports industry and beyond. Every day, we wake up and choose VLTED.

4. INCLUSION VLTED creates a space for everyone to participate: whether you are a huge sports fanatic or just getting involved, VLTED includes everyone in the conversation in a new, fresh way.

5. FUN This one is self explanatory!

Name: MiAO
Description:
With over two decades of experience in the Internet and Gaming industries, as well as years of user research, we are acutely aware that the purpose of games is no longer just to pass the time and have fun. Games offer an extra feature that interests people more than other forms of content, namely the capacity to engage with each other, an experience that is closer to the primordial need of human nature, which is the yearning for social engagement.

The Internet was created to bridge the gap between people and foster strong connections. Games create an excellent social environment for players, allowing us to expand our horizons and expand our imagination. The younger generation's reliance on games as a social language in the modern day is undeniable, and game players have a very high demand for social connection that is still insufficiently met.

So we see a huge potential opportunity in this industry: we believe that social is the future of gaming. The user scale of games can obviously breed platform-level applications, the virtual world of games + social networking, which will definitely be a platform-level opportunity, which is precisely why we created our company.

The meaning of games to people's lives can be more and more satisfied with people's yearning for a better life. It can eliminate people's loneliness, make it easier for people to make friends, and have a better understanding of real life. life has a very positive impact. We intend to utilize the games portal to connect hundreds of millions of people, give them with a better entertainment experience, and use social as a launching point to explore more possibilities for the combination of games and social interaction.

"Crafting game experiences that surpass expectations." – This is the mission and vision of MiAO.

Founded in 2019, Jadu started with a fascination for virtual characters colliding with real spaces.  Ten Unique Characters: Select your persona from a diverse cast of 10 intriguing characters, each with their own backstory and motives.

 Battle Royale Mode: Immerse yourself in heart-pounding action reminiscent of PUBG, with thrilling 1 vs. 100, 5 vs 100, or team vs team battles set in iconic San Francisco locations like Castro District, Fisherman's Wharf, and Russian Hill.

 Story Mode on the Blockchain: Dive deep into a gripping narrative where every choice you make shapes your character's destiny in an open world. The blockchain records every bullet fired, transforming them into unique NFT patches that represent your journey.

 In-Game Wallet: Grand Gangsta City spoils its players with a complimentary in-game wallet, ensuring your funds are secure. Partner games allow you to regenerate seed phrases and add two-layer OTP security for withdrawals.

Unveil the secrets of Grand Gangsta City by exploring our website and delving into our comprehensive whitepaper. Join us in a timeless adventure where the 1950s meets the future, and where legends are born in the world of blockchain gaming.

Misyonumuz, teknoloji ve yaratıcılığı bir araya getirerek hem bireysel hem de kurumsal müşterilerimiz için değer yaratmaktır. Bu doğrultuda, benzersiz ve ilgi çekici oyunlar geliştirmenin yanı sıra, işletmelerin verimliliğini artıran özelleştirilmiş yazılımlar sunuyoruz.

Geleceğin yeteneklerini desteklemek adına, 12-18 yaş arası gençlere oyun geliştirme atölyeleri düzenliyor ve mühendislik öğrencilerine teknik eğitim programları sunarak sektöre kalifiye bireyler kazandırmayı hedefliyoruz.

Bugüne kadar Simple Snake, Bubbles Pop, Crazy Breakout, Bounce Up gibi mobil oyunları hayata geçirdik. Ayrıca, üretim süreçlerini optimize eden Fabrika Simülasyon Projesi ve çalışan performansını objektif bir şekilde değerlendiren Performans Değerlendirme Yazılımı gibi kurumsal çözümler de geliştirdik.

Ineasoft olarak, teknolojiye olan tutkumuzla sürekli öğrenmeye ve gelişmeye devam ediyoruz. İş ortaklarımızla birlikte dijital dünyada yeni kapılar açmak için çalışıyoruz.

Name: Credexon
Description:
Credexon is a revolutionary fantasy gaming platform with innovative game modes for cricket and football. Fusing stock market concepts in the world of fantasy sports, Credexon wants to usher in a new era of fantasy gaming. With over 100k downloads and 45k users validating our innovative fantasy game modes, Credexon is pleased to launch its very own fantasy sports gaming API. 

With the advent and global adoption of fantasy sports, every Igaming platform and sportsbook is now offering fantasy games as an additional functionality to keep their users engaged. Why invest with your own time and resources when you can get a fully functional plug-in integrated seamlessly to your system with your own branding in less than 10 days? 

Whether you are a crypto based exchange, a sports book, a Web3 platform, an Igaming platform looking for a data plug in or additional engagement for your current users or even if you are a games aggregator or provider looking to expand on your offerings, there is something in the Credexon’s game API for you. If your business is also looking for a seamless fantasy sports plug in to join the fantasy revolution, look no further than our Games API. Our API offers disruptive game modes like contests where users can make their own customised teams and player accumulator where users can buy specific player shares and get a return if the player performs well.


Credexon provides a superlative user experience, giving added control and power to the user. Our data partners provide detailed player, match, team, and series statistics giving greater control to the user while also giving them the platform to engage with our innovative games.

Named after a “credit” based “exchange” system where players get amazing credits for using their skill & knowledge to make the right picks, Credexon is ushering in a new age of fantasy sports.

Name: Pooky Games
Description:
Pooky is a unique football results prediction game built on the Polygon blockchain. Using digital collectible Matchballs to enhance gameplay, fans of the beautiful game are rewarded for their passion, strategy and prediction skills. 

The primary objective of Pooky is to predict the exact score of football matches from the world’s biggest leagues and tournaments. Players use 3D Matchballs to make predictions, win Experience points (PXP) and battle for top position on the Pooky Leaderboards to win $POK, our in-game currency. As they progress through the ranks, players can Level Up, Breed and increase the value of their Matchballs to earn further rewards.

Pooky gives players ownership of digital collectibles that allow them to make predictions, earn rewards and upgrade their assets. Best of all, predictions don’t need to be 100% correct to win. 

Pooky’s risk-free model enables global reach and promotes a healthier alternative to traditional sports betting. By going back to the roots of sports prediction - challenging friends and demonstrating your knowledge of the beautiful game - Pooky encourages social interaction and fun whilst creating communities, both on and off the platform.

At Pooky, our mission is to build a safe and entertaining football community via collectible digital art ownership and a prediction game. From Paris to Guingamp, Chelsea to Shrewsbury Town, Madrid to Valladolid, Milan to Monza and Munich to Rostock, we want Pooky players to experience the excitement of sports prediction and be part of a leading web3 football fanbase.

Pooky is created by football fans, for football fans. Forever.

Name: ARA Journeys
Description:
About Us
At ARA Journeys, we preserve and share Indigenous knowledge, stories, and languages for future generations. Through innovative digital platforms, we amplify underrepresented communities, bringing Indigenous stories and worldviews to life. Our work is driven by the belief that technology can be a tool for cultural preservation and education.

Our Mission
We harness the power of technology to ensure Indigenous wisdom thrives in the digital age. Through immersive, interactive experiences, we educate and inspire, offering the world a unique view through an Indigenous lens. We strive to be leaders in Indigenous tech, bridging traditional knowledge with future innovation.

Our Values

> Transparency (Pono): Clear, open, and honest communication.
> Creativity (Auahatanga): Bold, innovative thinking.
> Trust (Whakapono): Reliability and consistency in all we do.
> Authenticity (Tūturu): Genuine content rooted in Indigenous values.
> Originality (Taketake): Fresh, impactful, and culturally rich solutions.

What We Do
We create digital platforms that include:
> Interactive Games: Teaching Indigenous languages and traditions.
> Augmented Reality (AR) Experiences: Immersing users in Indigenous stories.
> Mobile Apps: Cultural tools educating on Indigenous perspectives.
> Storytelling Platforms: Amplifying Indigenous voices and heritage.

Why Work With Us?
Collaborating with ARA Journeys means contributing to the preservation and celebration of Indigenous cultures. Whether you’re a business, educator, or community leader, we help you bring impactful, culturally rich digital experiences to life.

Specialties
Indigenous Knowledge Preservation, Digital Platforms, Storytelling, Augmented Reality, Cultural Education, Game Development, Language Revitalization

Name: toast
Description:
The iGaming industry is evolving. Bettors demand more than just chance-based games - they want skill, strategy, and competition. Skill games today, rely too much on reflexes and dexterity, failing to deliver the calculated decision-making and strategic depth that sports bettors and fantasy players enjoy. At toast, we bridge this gap by licensing real-time multiplayer skill games designed specifically for iGaming operators.

We love innovative yet simplistic game design and bring the joy of games in real money gaming. With our lightweight yet powerful tech stack, we offer to our partners a seamless and quick integration of games that deliver joy, excitement and unforgettable entertainment to your players.

Beyond player demand, regulatory changes are making skill games a key area of growth. With uncertainty surrounding traditional gambling models and sweepstakes, skill-based games offer operators a legally sound alternative that is already accepted in many jurisdictions. toast’s games have undergone legal scrutiny and are classified as skill-based in almost all states, making them a reliable, compliant option for long-term growth.

Bettors are evolving, and iGaming must evolve with them. With legally sound, strategy-driven skill games, instant liquidity, and VIP-level player engagement, Toast is defining the next frontier of real-money gaming.

With a focus on high-quality, free-to-play games that deliver on all aspects, Yeeha Games is set to raise the bar and shape the future of blockchain gaming. Its free-to-play games serve as a bridge for players in the traditional gaming space to enter web3 gaming without the need to purchase cryptocurrencies from the get-go, allowing them to fully experience the game before purchasing their first digital assets. 
 
Pushing boundaries of the current GameFi space, Yeeha Games seeks to introduce a broad range of game genres to the ecosystem, including but not limited to MMORPG, SLG, open world, simulation, and idle RPG card games to cater to different users. 

To help players transition smoothly into web3 gaming, the Yeeha Games marketplace has a built-in wallet that supports both fiat and crypto deposits. Players would also be able to make transactions gas-free across all of its platform’s game titles.

Name: From the French - One Touch
Description:
From The French is an independent studio based in Lyon with a simple yet ambitious mission: reinvent how football is played in video games. Built by lifelong friends and seasoned creators — experts in game design, mobile, and technology — the studio is shaping a new generation of sports experiences: fast, strategic, accessible, and deeply rooted in football culture.

Our first title, One Touch, is the world’s first mobile strategic card game that transforms the intensity of a real match into a sharp, tactical player-vs-player duel. No simulation. No arcade tricks. Here, strategy leads the game, the clock dictates the tension, and every card contributes to a real offensive or defensive action. Two players, 20 cards each, 90 fictional minutes… and only one football vision survives.

One Touch captures what makes football magic: national identities, unique playstyles, match momentum, pressure, fatigue, dramatic turns. Then we fuse it with the depth of a modern TCG: deck-building, tempo control, mind games, evolving meta, progression, collection, live ops, even real-world rewards. A system built to last, scale, and grow — supported by an accessible, proven, mobile-first economy.

What sets us apart is our fully embraced French DNA: a bold artistic direction, a sharp sense of sports storytelling, and that ability to surprise where no one expects it. It’s also the arrival of Nicolas Anelka — ambassador and shareholder — bringing credibility, vision, and an unparalleled football network. And above all, it’s a growing community of players, already engaged long before release.

From The French isn’t just a studio — it’s a new voice in sports gaming. With One Touch, we’re laying the foundation of a global multi-sport franchise, built from one universal passion.

Go Fusion scanne les priorités et contenus de l’entreprise (IA, cybersécurité, innovation, climat, QVT, culture…) et les transforme en micro-expériences gamifiées de 3 minutes (quiz, défis, feedback).
Résultat : les collaborateurs comprennent, s’approprient et appliquent la stratégie en continu.

 Deuxième levier : le partage des pratiques terrain (Bottom-Up)
Les collaborateurs partagent leurs retours d’expérience, méthodologies et bonnes pratiques directement dans la plateforme.
On ne réinvente pas la roue : l’entreprise capitalise sur l’existant, transforme l’intelligence collective en standards partagés et accélère la montée en compétence de tous.

 Bénéfices mesurables :
	•	20 jours gagnés par collaborateur et par an

Name: Icelandic Diamonds
Description:
Have you ever wondered what would happen if you combined the game play of Bejeweled, the FOMO of BeReal and the giveaway madness of MrBeast all into one app experience? Yeah, we hadn't either, until Icelandic Diamonds was born.

How was it born, you ask? Well, when Apple announced their innovative approach to fixing the notch with Dynamic Island, we knew we had to create an entirely new game experience built around that technology. But don't fret, it also works for pretty much every Apple device out there today.

Here's how it works:
• There is one diamond drop that happens randomly each day
• A grid of mountains and diamonds appear, and you have to tap only on the diamonds as fast as you can
• The *first* person to tap on all 5 diamonds wins that day's prize
• You can purchase hints to give you a better idea of what time the diamonds will drop
• If your iPhone supports Dynamic Island or you check your Notification Center on any device, you'll be able to get notified of the status throughout the day, without needing to be in the app itself

Prizes will start out small at first, but as we grow, so will the prizes! So tell your friends & family so you can compete with them on the leaderboard each day.

Oh and P to the S, it seems like no one is really talking about Wordle anymore (sad face)? So let's make Icelandic Diamonds the new daily game!

Thanks!

Axel & Thor, your favorite Icelandic-themed app developers

LEGAL DISCLAIMERS:
// This product was not built with or consulted by Apple in any way and any reference or association with the Dynamic Island is out of sheer, mad respect.
// This product has zero ties to Bejeweled, BeReal, or MrBeast, we literally just think that our app is a Frankenstein monster of those 3 unique brands and what they do best.
// This has been found to be extremely addictive. But like... not in a bad way, because you're not wasting your entire day in the app like [every silly social media app out there today].

Name: Medieval Empires
Description:
Medieval Empires is an elaborate, multi-player online strategy game set in what is now modern-day Turkey during the late 13th century. The storyline of the game initially focuses on Ertuğrul Gazi, a tribal warrior and a celebrated leader of the Kayi tribe. 


In the game, the Leader of the Kayi Turkic Tribe, Ertuğrul Gazi, played by Engin Altan Düzyatan,  will face off against the future King of England, Edward 1st aka Edward Longshanks aka Hammer of the Scots, who is expanding a successful 9th Crusade across Europe to the Holy Land.

Built on the Polygon blockchain, the players are able to Play & Own enabling them to own in-game NFT assets with real value, while building and expanding their empires, managing their lands and defending against invaders. 

The existing and planned versions of the Medieval Empires game are a fictionalised depiction of certain historical figures and historical periods. The source historical content on which the game is based, which it does and will depict, are in the public domain. This game and its content have no affiliation or connection to any existing television, radio, or other media content depicting the same or similar historical events or figures. The game and all related content (including promotional content), copyright and other rights property of Medieval Empires PTE Ltd are used under license from the lawful owners.

Біз шығыстан, Өскемен қаласынан шыққан қазақстандық технологиялық холдингпіз. Жұмысымыздың негізгі бағыты - мобильді ойындарды жасау. Солардың ішінде ерекше орын алатын флагмандық жобамыз – Grand Mobile, ай сайын 5 миллионнан астам белсенді пайдаланушысы бар, ашық әлемді, мобильді ойын.

Ойын индустриясынан бөлек, біз цифрлық сервистер экожүйесін құрып, дамытып келеміз: олардың қатарында Emenu тағам жеткізу сервисі, сондай-ақ бизнес пен мемлекеттік құрылымдарға арналған жасанды интеллект негізіндегі шешімдер бар. Біз өңірдің цифрлық инфрақұрылымының дамуына үлес қосатын және адамдардың күнделікті өмірінің бір бөлігіне айналатын технологиялық өнімдер жасағанымызды мақсат тұтамыз.

  

Миссия Grand Games – создавать мобильные игры и технологичные продукты, определяющие новый уровень пользовательского опыта.

Мы – казахстанский технологический холдинг, родом из Усть-Каменогорска. В основе нашей деятельности – разработка мобильных игр, среди которых особое место занимает наш флагманский проект Grand Mobile – мобильная игра с открытым миром, в которую ежемесячно играют более 5 миллионов активных пользователей.

Помимо игровой индустрии, мы создаем и развиваем экосистему цифровых сервисов: среди них — сервис доставки еды Emenu, а также решения на базе искусственного интеллекта для бизнеса и государственных структур. Мы стремимся формировать технологические продукты, которые становятся частью ежедневной жизни людей и способствуют развитию цифровой инфраструктуры региона.

Name: askblu.ai [Every Player Counts]
Description:
Machine Learning can dramatically increase player’s engagement and LTV across many mobile games, but its widespread adoption is hampered by a lack of suitable machine learning infrastructure (MLOps), which in turn leads to high costs, over dependence on cloud platforms and network availability. 
 
To remove these barriers to AI for mobile games, askblu.ai is a SaaS Data-Science platform built on 2 simple but revolutionary pillars. 

- First, it provides Real-Time “in-game” inference and prediction, at the player-level, because the best time to act (change a stage difficulty, personalize an offer, adapt the ads pressure…) is when the player is in a session.

- Second, it computes players’ variable and builds machine learning models from very few events, familiar to producer and game designer, not data scientist, in a robust Unity SDK, without using any personal data or IDFA.
 
askblu.ai state-of-the-art Real-Time Data-Science platform will revolutionize AI for mobile games.

Designed by data scientists and mobile game designers and developers, askblu.ai platform enable game teams to build or use machine learning solutions, trained with their own data, and push models into production and deploy them faster, more privately, and cost efficiently than ever before. 

Mobile game studios can either get their own custom solution (work-for-hire), or adopt “Plug&Play”  solutions and use AI to increase their players’ engagement and LTV, thus their revenues.

Description:
Chroneum is an organic continuation of our development and launch of the real world metaverse ‘Unisphere’ with its core custom AR browser ‘New Layer’.

Chroneum is a location-based AR game on the real world L2, L3 and more, involving players to take on the role of a Chronolier, joining a LiveOps movement, and engaging in missions to fight for the integrity of the digital atmosphere.

The game has been designed with scale and longevity in mind, involving a balanced tokenomics combined with an extensive set of customisable and tradable game assets, as well as multiple active and passive earning mechanics that can be leveraged by the players.

Besides different game modes, seasons and battle passes, PvP elements will be added to enrich the gaming experience and enhance the complexity of the gaming economy.

The game will launch with both free-to-play and premium user pathways, as well as an innovative scholarship model that aims at regenerative economy mass adoption.

Chroneum is the first GameFi unit in the Unisphere, introducing a revolutionary move-to-earn game mechanics on the real world layers.

Description:
Our Vision

To be the most enriching and go-to gaming platform for the 350 Million+ Indian gamers and 2 Billion+ Global gamers.

Our Values

* Customer First 
Always put your customer first. We should do everything to ensure that our customers get the best service and the best experience of our offerings. Customer satisfaction is a crucial part of Boom games.

* Ownership
Take responsibility and drive things as if it is your own initiative, your own business. Be proactive in solving problems as how you would want them to be solved if the problems were faced by you.

* Speed
Timing is everything. Having the first mover advantage will give you more time to explore, learn, and course-correct faster than the competitors. We must be adaptable, agile, and nimble in our work. 

* Challenge
Be brave in questioning the existing ways of doing things. Challenge the status quo whether it is in policies, practices, or the way of working. Back your challenge with substantial research.

* Openness
Be open to criticism, be open to feedback, be open to unlearning and taking risks, be open to acknowledge and appreciate others, be open to thinking differently and thinking big.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between the web2 and web3 gaming spaces, providing players with a seamless gaming experience. We aim to enable web2 game studios to effortlessly integrate blockchain technologies into their games.

At Hexacore, we maintain a suite of frameworks, tools, and primitives designed to facilitate the creation of a new generation of open-economy games. Our approach involves:
1. Utilizing proven gameplay with a stable unit economy.
2. Building a robust community.
3. Incorporating digital ownership and an open economy.
4. Implementing hybrid web2 and web3 monetization.
5. Stabilizing the unit economy.
6. Scaling the audience.

Our strategy results in a sustainable economy and a larger audience for our games.

The move caters to the growing demands of a fast-paced and ever-evolving world in which people consume all things digital. Now with more than 50 game titles and gift cards to choose from, Wallet Codes enables a hassle-free purchase experience for users through multiple payment modes available for faster and safer transactions in seven countries worldwide, including Cambodia, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, Philippines, Taiwan, and Thailand.

Name: BusyBee
Description:
BusyBee, is an application for families that want to motivate their kids into actively doing more around the home by using a simple & fun rewards system. 

Within the BusyBee App, parents will be able to create a profile for each member of the family, create personalized household chores each with their own custom point value as well as create exciting & personalized rewards, that will motivate their kids into wanting to complete their tasks!

They will start accumulating points towards their point balance which they will eventually be able to exchange for selected rewards and they will also have the opportunity to win extra points! Rewards could be anything! A new book, extra screen time, a fun activity with friends or even the new Hogwarts Legacy Game!

Redeeming rewards is not the only option; they will also be able to save their money, which will earn a custom set interest rate, send money to a sibling or donate money to a local charity listed within the app, not only teaching valuable lessons in finance management from a young age, but also the importance of 'giving back'.

Atualmente, estamos focados no desenvolvimento do nosso primeiro grande projeto: Summoned Guardians, um jogo que combina elementos de RPG e RTS para proporcionar um multiplayer dinâmico e imersivo. Nosso objetivo é oferecer desafios estratégicos, exploração e evolução, garantindo uma experiência envolvente para todos os tipos de jogadores.

Nosso estúdio ainda está em crescimento, com uma equipe talentosa composta por game designers, desenvolvedores, artistas 2D e 3D, animadores e especialistas em UI/UX. Acreditamos que, com dedicação e inovação, podemos expandir nosso portfólio e levar nossos jogos para outras plataformas no futuro, além de buscar novas oportunidades e parcerias no setor de games.

A Mandacaru Digital Games é mais do que um estúdio; é um espaço onde a paixão por criar jogos se transforma em realidade. Estamos apenas começando, e o futuro nos reserva muitas aventuras e novos mundos a serem explorados.

Name: Tales Of Aleko
Description:
Introducing a groundbreaking competitive Esports based game, integrated with AI technology and an NFT marketplace by MetaBay, that takes music rhythm gaming to the next level. This game is not only fun to play, but also offers the opportunity to win and earn.

Featuring seasonal competitions, as well as a competitive arena, adventure and materials farming open world. This skilled-based arcade rhythm game provides an addictive collecting experience for upgrades.
With a contract in place with famous artists for new songs, players will experience elevated gameplay experiences.

Musicians and artists can mint, place, or debut their songs/albums into the game's marketplace, and fully utilize their talents in both the web3 space and in real life. This sustainable game economy allows for competitive PvP and PvE gaming, with in-game mechanisms to win and earn. Additionally, the game creates a social network for players to gather together.

AI technology is integrated into the game, offering chat or voice for fast access while gaming, and a seamless process for real-world errands. The game also utilizes a unique tokenomics distribution system, with collectible music by partnered musicians on the blockchain.

By enabling musicians to generate passive income without the need for their physical presence, this game is will revolutionize the music industry and helping artists promote seamlessly to gaming users through modern, tech-savvy methods.

Join the game and experience a new level of music rhythm gaming that combines technology, music, and esports competition.

北京壳木软件有限责任公司成立于2009年8月，一直以来专注于安卓及iOS平台手机游戏的研发与运营，是一家高新型专业化的手机游戏企业，2014年成为神州泰岳集团的全资子公司，经过多年的发展壮大已逐步成长为国内优秀的兼具游戏研发和全球发行的公司。迄今为止，已在中国大陆、港澳台地区、美国、日本、韩国、加拿大、澳大利亚、英国、巴西、土耳其，以及东南亚、中东和欧洲等多个市场发行运营了多款取得巨大成功的手机游戏。
自公司成立以来，累计推出20余款游戏。其中有14款获得过谷歌和苹果商店的全球推荐。从《Little Empire》开始，就深入研究海外SLG用户的喜好和特点，积累更丰富的海外市场的SLG游戏的研发与运营经验。《War and Order》《Age of Z Origins》等项目的研发运营过程中，对重度SLG游戏市场和用户的认知和经验进一步得到提升。

Name: VAMEON
Description:
Nestled in the heart of the UAE, in the bustling city of Dubai, lies the headquarters of Vameon, a game studio that’s not just about play, but revolution.

We have more than 20 experienced specialists and developers in our diverse and growing international team. Each of them is dedicated to enhancing the gaming experience with the latest Web3 technologies. Our team includes artists, animators, and designers who work together with blockchain experts to create an innovative web3 gaming space, bringing new ideas to the modern world.

At the core of Vameon’s innovative approach is our unwavering focus on blockchain games (dApps) and Web3 technologies. But why blockchain? The answer is simple: empowerment. Leveraging the power of blockchain, we ensure that the game account is solely in the hands of its rightful owner, the players, governed by the NFT tokens linked to it.

Drawing inspiration from the allure of vampire lore, Vameon crafts an unparalleled metaverse—the dEmpire of Vampire. Venture into a realm where every corner reveals a new mystery, every shadow hides a story, and every experience is uniquely yours.

Our mission goes beyond entertainment. We aim to foster the mass adoption of crypto technologies within the gaming industry, enabling every player to truly own their game account, characters, and their hard-earned achievements.

Our ultimate vision? A ground-breaking decentralized game where players globally are captivated by an enthralling narrative powered by blockchain.

The dEmpire of Vampire. No diversions, no third-party tools, just a holistic in-game experience where players have complete access to crypto functionalities seamlessly integrated into the game.

Prepare yourself. The World of Darkness, reimagined for the modern era, awaits you!

With built-in segmentation, A/B testing, offer management, UI Builder, and LiveOps calendar tools, Balancy makes it easy to launch new monetization ideas, prevent churn with engaging event schedules, and scale your live service operations.

Our new LiveOps Starter Kit includes ready-to-use Royal Match–inspired templates (events, mini-games, offers, and chain deals) to help studios ship faster. Teams can also customize calendars, test new event cadences, and adopt modern LiveOps practices without starting from scratch.

Top publishers like Lion Studios, Kwalee, and My.Games use Balancy to power their LiveOps and grow LTV.

Description:
MadOut Games — команда профессионалов, которые выросли на GTA, а сейчас создают свой собственный мир, где знакомые улицы и гонки живут своими законами. Мы взяли атмосферу Лос-Сантоса и Либерти-Сити и перенесли ее в наши дворы с панельками и турниками, чтобы свобода улиц, гонки и хаос соседствовали с тем миром, который мы знаем с детства.

Наша цель — создать игру, в которую сами хотим играть и которой можно гордиться. И у нас действительно это получается, MadOut2 уже скачали более 200 миллионов человек.

В команде MadOut Games — программисты, художники, дизайнеры, тестировщики, продюсеры, аналитики и другие специалисты, которых объединяет любовь к играм и желание делать классно. Мы делимся идеями, обсуждаем варианты, иногда спорим, ломаем и собираем заново, чтобы добиться результата. Любовь к жанру и стремление создавать крутую игру объединяет нас и дает общую цель.

Наша главная ценность — люди. Для нас важно, когда говорят прямо, вовлекаются в процесс и не боятся брать ответственность! Мы ценим свежий взгляд, опыт новых коллег и честный фидбэк.

Если ты дочитал до конца и тебе близок такой подход, мы будем рады вместе делать MadOut2 вместе с тобой!

Name: 슈퍼크리에이티브
Description:
'게임의 새로운 기준을 만듭니다'

슈퍼크리에이티브는 2015년부터 시작된 게임 개발 전문 스튜디오로
모두가 꿈꿔온 최고 퀄리티의 게임 개발을 위해 오늘도 끊임없는 도전을 이어가고 있습니다. 
2018년 런칭한 에픽세븐은 현재까지도 글로벌 140여개국에서 큰 사랑을 받고 있으며
저들에게 전에 없던 감동과 즐거움을 선사하고자 새로운 프로젝트도 준비하고 있습니다.
우리가 게임의 기준이 되는 그날까지 끊임없이 노력하겠습니다. 
개발에 대한 자부심으로 세상의 변화를 주도하는 우리는 슈퍼크리에이티브입니다.


 미션
슈퍼크리에이티브는 게임을 사랑하는 개발자들이 모여,
우리가 사랑했던 그 감성이
저의 삶에 선물처럼 닿기를 바라는 마음에서 시작됐습니다.

슈퍼크리에이티브의 목표는
모두가 꿈꿔온 최고 퀄리티의 게임을 개발하는 것이며
퀄리티를 위해서라면 그 어떠한 것도 타협하지 않았습니다.

에픽세븐은 긴 시간 수많은 이들의 열정으로 세상에 나왔고,
오늘도 우리가 게임의 새로운 기준이 될 수 있도록
끊임없이 노력하고 있습니다.

게임에 담긴 우리의 고민이
당신을 만나 특별한 의미가 되었으면 합니다.
슈퍼크리에이티브만의 감성으로
저에게 영원히 기억될 감동을 만들어가겠습니다.
우리가 준비한 즐거움을 오래도록 즐겨주시기 바랍니다.

- Des contenus peu engageants, difficiles à retenir
- Une motivation qui s’essouffle rapidement

Une curiosité bien réelle, mais un apprentissage qui ne dure pas.

courte, ludique, engageante.

Stimuler votre curiosité, renforcer vos connaissances et faire de l’apprentissage une habitude durable.
Concrètement, Kurio vous permet de :
1 Apprendre chaque jour en quelques minutes
2 Tester et renforcer vos connaissances grâce au jeu
3 Rester motivé grâce à des formats interactifs
4 Progresser sans pression, à votre rythme

Ce que vous gagnez :
 Une culture générale plus solide et plus vivante

 Une expérience intelligente et addictive

Name: Bagatur Chess Engine
Description:
Offline chess play with 16 strength levels. Chess Engine with its own GUI. Chess AI.

Description
This is the open source Bagatur Chess Engine with its own GUI (graphical user interface).

It is not as strong as Stockfish, Komodo, AlphaZero or Leela Chess Zero, but is strong enough to beat a grandmaster.

It has 16 strength levels. From level 5, it could show the search information.

The ELO rating is about 3000 and the program has a unique playing style.

In general, the application demonstrates an application of artificial intelligence (AI) into the domain of chess.

To clarify, it is not an OEX chess engine and other chess engines cannot be imported into the GUI.

Playing instructions
- Check the menu and make sure the strength level is appropriate.

- Select/deselect the Human/Computer buttons for both sides according to which side you want to play and whether you play against a computer or another person.

- Use the flip board button to change sides if you play with black.

- Move the piece by drag and drop or by selecting from/to squares.

- If you want, you could use the move navigation buttons to go back and forward in the move sequence.

- It is recommended to check all settings in the menu and make sure you play with the option you like most (e.g. move animation speed, chess pieces set, colors).

Features
- FEN import/export/share.

- Different modes: Human-Human, Human-Bagatur, Bagatur-Bagatur.

- Different strengths levels.

- The app could show the best moves line as well as the evaluation of the board position produced by Bagatur.

- Navigation of played move’s (first, previous, next, last).

- Flipboard function.

- Moving by drag and drop as well as by selecting from and to squares.

- Supports different color palettes and chess pieces sets for different tastes.

Kit’Chef : Le compagnon culinaire des nouvelles générations ! 

Inspirée des réseaux sociaux, Kit’Chef est l’application qui redonne aux jeunes le plaisir de cuisiner tout en mettant l’alimentation responsable au cœur de leur quotidien. 

Avec Kit’Chef, tu retrouves tes créateurs food préférés, tu scrolles leurs recettes comme sur TikTok et Instagram, et en un clic, tu ajoutes les recettes à ton menu de la semaine. L’app te génère automatiquement ta liste de courses ! 

Notre mission ? Simplifier la cuisine quotidienne pour les jeunes et les accompagner vers une alimentation plus responsable. 

Comment ? 
- Nous centraliserons les acteurs de l’alimentation durable pour rendre l’achat de produits locaux aussi facile qu’une commande en drive.

Mais qui se cache derrière Kit’Chef ?
Kit’Chef est né de l’initiative de Mehdi, un étudiant de 22 ans en informatique à EPITECH, passionné par l’entrepreneuriat et soucieux de changer les choses. 
C'est quand il a fait une overdose de pâtes au pesto pendant qu'il salivait devant les recettes des réseaux sociaux que l'idée à germé.

Confronté aux défis de cuisiner sur les réseaux sociaux et ceux de la mise en place d’une alimentation saine et responsable, il s’est lancé dans cette aventure pour simplifier la cuisine quotidienne des jeunes. Mehdi a imaginé une app qui leur ressemble afin de faire évoluer les habitudes alimentaires des jeunes générations actuelles ET futures.

Un contact, une opportunité, un partenaire, un journaliste, un investisseur etc... Quoi que ce soit qui puisse nous aider à faire connaître et grandir le projet !

Name: Mind Adaptivity Test (MAT) Cards
Description:
The purpose of this app is to test and measure how well people can adapt to the changing rules.

It is actually challenging your brain and testing your mind’s adaptability.

Indeed, this app is inspired by the original work by Grant, D. A., & Berg, E. A. (1948) – A Behavioral Analysis of Degree of Reinforcement and Ease of Shifting to New Responses in a Weigl-Type Card-Sorting Problem. Journal of Experimental Psychology, 38, 404-411.

It might look similar to Wisconsin Card Sorting Test (WCST), as copyrighted in the US, but is not the actual WCST and is different in a number of important aspects.

If you want to have the original exact Wisconsin Card Sorting Test (WCST), please find the publisher’s information.

Usage instructions
- In the MAT Cards you need to match a card with one of the four cards on the buttons.

- After the selection you will get feedback whether the card’s selection is correct or not.

- If not, you have to apply different rules and match again.

- In general, there are 3 variants of logic or rule you could use – objects on the card have color, shape and count.

- After you find the rule you may use it for a while, because the rule will stay the same for a number of questions, depending on the playing mode.

- But that is not all. The rule is changing and you have to adapt by getting feedback from the app in order to match the card again.

- So, the goal is to answer all questions trying to find each rule as fast as possible and have as many as possible correct answers at the end.

Features
- Questions organized as an test sequence.

- There are different modes of playing – shorter and longer questionnaires – starting from 18-30 questions and going up to 72-120 questions.

- Shows the result after the test (count of correct/incorrect, time used)

- Leaves the interpretation and categorization of the results open to you and at the same time if you have better scores this means bigger mind agility.

- Supports different color palettes and tastes

Name: Ballies

At our core is a next-generation AI-powered prediction market built to merge real-time data, skill-based competition, and decentralized finance. Unlike traditional sportsbooks that rely on static odds, Ballies empowers users to trade predictions dynamically, compete in PvP microbet battles, and leverage advanced AI agents to gain a measurable edge.

Our ecosystem is designed around three key pillars:
	1.	Prediction Markets Reimagined – Users don’t just bet—they trade sports outcomes like assets. With sports perpetuals, anyone can go long or short on implied odds, unlocking a fluid, fair, and transparent alternative to traditional betting.
	2.	AI-Driven Competitive Layer – Real-time microbets, predictive duels, and AI-assisted insights transform sports prediction into a skill-based experience. Our AI agents analyze momentum, fatigue, and historical patterns, giving players actionable intelligence—not guesswork.
	3.	Decentralized Infrastructure – Powered by blockchain, Ballies eliminates intermediaries, ensures transparent payouts, and rewards top performers through bonding curves, agent staking, and community governance.

Ballies has rapidly built a thriving user base, with hundreds of thousands of active participants, strong retention rates, and deep engagement across football, basketball, eSports, and more. Our AI Betting Assistant has already delivered over 30% ROI boosts for active users, proving the power of intelligence-driven prediction.

Our vision is bold: to build the ultimate global prediction layer, where users, creators, and AI agents compete, collaborate, and monetize their predictive edge. We’re not just following industry trends—we’re setting them.

This is the future where sports, AI, and DeFi converge.
Ballies — Where Skill Beats the Odds.
