Description:
Apptivate, mobil uygulama dünyasında sınırları zorlayan ve kendi yenilikçi fikirleriyle fark yaratan bir teknoloji ekibidir. Amacımız, hayal ettiğimiz projeleri hayata geçirerek kullanıcıların dijital deneyimlerini daha anlamlı ve eğlenceli hale getirmektir.

Bugüne kadar geliştirdiğimiz üç uygulama, 250 binden fazla indirme ile büyük bir başarıya ulaştı. İlki olan Quizlingo, dil öğrenmeyi keyifli bir oyun haline getirerek kullanıcıların etkileşimli testlerle dil becerilerini geliştirmesini sağladı. Eğlenceli ve öğretici yapısı sayesinde geniş bir kullanıcı kitlesi tarafından benimsendi.

İkinci uygulamamız Cümlematik, yabancı dildeki cümle yapılarını eğlenceli bir formatta öğretmeyi amaçlıyor. Kullanıcılar, interaktif görevlerle kendi cümlelerini oluştururken, dil bilgisi kurallarını daha iyi kavrama fırsatı buluyor. Cümlematik, dil becerilerini geliştirmek isteyen herkes için pratik ve kolay bir çözüm sundu.

Son olarak, Gramer Rehberi ise dil bilgisi konusunda derinlemesine bilgi sunan, adım adım rehberlik sağlayan bir uygulamadır. Kullanıcı dostu arayüzü ve kapsamlı içeriğiyle dil öğrenenler ve dil bilgisi konusunda kendini geliştirmek isteyenler için vazgeçilmez bir kaynak haline geldi.

Apptivate olarak, kullanıcılarımıza her zaman daha iyi bir dijital deneyim sunmak için yenilikçi çözümler geliştirmeye devam ediyoruz. Mobil dünyanın sunduğu fırsatları en iyi şekilde değerlendirerek, geleceğin dijital projelerine yön vermeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: Mata-Mata
Description:
Já imaginou um Fantasy Game onde a sobrevivência semanal é a única regra? Onde a sorte dá lugar à habilidade pura, e cada escolha pode ser sua última no torneio?

Muito prazer, somos o Mata-Mata. O primeiro Fantasy de futebol no Brasil, do estilo sobrevivência, onde a estratégia e habilidade sāo essenciais para vencer.  Já somos mais de 50 mil de jogadores apaixonados por adrenalina cadastrados.

Por que o Mata-Mata é único?

Estratégia é Tudo: A habilidade de montar, ajustar e reinventar seu time a cada semana é o que separa os novatos dos campeões. É um xadrez semanal disfarçado de jogo.

Mecânica de Sobrevivência: A emoção de escapar da eliminação e avançar para a próxima fase é viciante. Cria narrativas épicas e uma comunidade engajada como nenhuma outra.

Crescimento Explosivo: Já somos uma comunidade vibrante de mais de 50 mil jogadores apaixonados que respiram adrenalina e competição saudável. E esse número não para de crescer!

Estamos construindo não apenas um jogo, mas um movimento que redefine o que é ser um fã de esportes no Brasil. A popularidade do fantasy game está apenas começando a ganhar força por aqui, e o Mata-Mata está na vanguarda, provando que o público brasileiro anseia por desafios mais profundos e estratégicos.

Se você é um apaixonado por esportes, estratégia e adrenalina, seu lugar é aqui.

 Junte-se a nós: https://www.matamata.com.br/

#MataMata #FantasyGame #InovaçãoEmGames #Estratégia #Sobrevivência #SportTech #StartupBrasil #Adrenalina #Games #Futebol

Description: Onder de projectnaam Bikescape Tours willen we graag met Loconsilio Game Design een nieuwe toepassing lanceren binnen de welbekende wereld van Escape Rooms. Zoals de naam reeds doet vermoeden, is onze ambitie om vrienden, families, en collega's al fietsend te laten genieten van de natuur terwijl ze onze Outdoor Escape Rooms oplossen in de buitenlucht. Deze Outdoor Escape Rooms, of beter genaamd 'Escape Fietstochten' zoals wij ze noemen, zullen speelbaar zijn met 2-6 spelers per team en omvatten een toegankelijke fietsafstand van 30-40km. Als eerste opzet is onze doelstelling om 4 unieke thema's te ontwikkelen die geplaatst zullen worden in 8 regio's binnen de provincie Limburg. De volledige activiteit neemt afhankelijk van het aantal pauzes een goede 4-5u in beslag en is zo de ideale activiteit in weekends of vakanties. Om deze Escape Fietstochten te lanceren alsook te faciliteren zullen tot slot de nodige stakeholders in de sector worden ingeschakeld. (Fietsverhuurders, Catering, Horeca, Ijsjeszaken, ...)

Name: Radiomon
Description:
Education forms the foundation of prosperous and equitable societies, enabling individuals to make informed decisions and approach life with curiosity and data-driven reasoning. At the age of the fourth industrial revolution, education should permeate across all facets of our life, rather than being confined to schools, and make use of innovations, new models and new technologies. 
We believe in the potential of video games as powerful educational tools. We see video games primarily as entertainment, but we believe that combining fun and learning can make education more engaging and effective.
That's the concept of "core edutainment": creating games that keep the player engaged because fun to play all while integrating as many educational aspects as possible, to be learned as a side effect via playing. 

Our vision is to create a virtual universe that allows to visualize something that cannot be seen by anyone: the atoms. Combining a database of nuclear physics properties with attractive graphics and narrative, the player will discover the 3000+ isotopes, interact with them and understand how they behave.
The game will gamify all nuclear applications, from sterilization to reactor physics, and can adapt into specific applications that a company would like to visualize. From there, the expansion towards chemistry is at reach, and then to material science and biology…science is the limit!

Name: Apnozzz
Description:
Apnozzz est sur le point de révolutionner le traitement des apnées du sommeil chez les enfants de 6 à 18 ans en le transformant en une véritable aventure ludique. 

Comment les motiver durablement à faire les exercices nécessaires à domicile, si ce n’est en les intégrant dans leur propre univers de jeu ?

L’innovation que nous sommes en train de développer permettra un suivi en temps réel des progrès des enfants, offrant ainsi aux professionnels de santé la possibilité d'ajuster les exercices à distance pour une prise en charge personnalisée. 

Les parents, débarrassés du souci de surveiller constamment la pratique des exercices, pourront s'impliquer dans le jeu de manière complice pour encourager l'enfant et se réjouir de ses progrès.

Pour que cette application numérique réponde parfaitement à la spécificité de vos besoins thérapeutiques, nous avons besoin de vous !

Nous invitons les orthodontistes/dentistes, orthophonistes/logopèdes/logopédistes, kinésithérapeutes et ostéopathes à rejoindre la communauté Apnozzz. 

Votre expertise est essentielle pour construire et valider « LA » solution qui répondra aux besoins réels des enfants et de leurs familles.

Ensemble, nous pouvons transformer le traitement de l'apnée du sommeil en une expérience positive et engageante grâce à notre application, fruit d’une recherche en pédagogie active associée à une créativité unique en Game Design.

Participez activement à ce projet de santé essentiel et contribuez à faire d'Apnozzz un outil incontournable et international pour le suivi de vos jeunes patients !

Name: Bets Between Friends
Description:
C’est autour d’un verre en terrasse que l’idée de Bets Between Friends est née. Alliant convivialité et challenge, parier du vin et du champagne devient la clé d’une belle innovation entre Henri Boulet et Quentin Despeisse. 
Issu d’une école de commerce et âgé de seulement 20 ans, Henri s’apprête au rôle d’entrepreneur et démarche Quentin, 24 ans, ingénieur EN informatique. 
De nature épicurienne, ils souhaitent proposer un concept qui conçoit le partage, les moments de bonheur entre amis et en famille.
Les deux associés se lancent alors dans la création de BBF en novembre 2021. 

Jeunes et ambitieux, ils développent petit à petit leur réseau, rencontrent des producteurs à Reims et Avignon, présentent le projet à de nombreux potentiels clients à Marseille et Paris. 
Aujourd’hui, ce sont sept vignobles français qui collaborent avec la startup marseillaise. Bets Between Friends propose du vin et du champagne haut de gamme tels que le Bordeaux, le Bourgogne, le Châteauneuf-du-Pape et les Côtes de Provence.

Name: Game Publishing & Marketing Summit
Description:
On 9-10 September, in London at the Novotel London West, the Game Publishing and Marketing Summit goes live as the only event dedicated exclusively to tackling the multi-platform challenges of game publishing and marketing.

Bringing together experts from AAA studios, indie developers, and industry-leading publishers, this game-changing summit offers you the opportunity to discover new strategies and boost your reach in the industry.

Name: Brands In Games (BIG)
Description:
Brands In Games (BIG) lets mobile games reward players with in-game virtual currency from real-world purchases 

Players already shop every day with major brands . BIG connects those purchases to games, so players earn in-game rewards and virtual currency without changing how they spend. The experience feels natural to players and fits seamlessly inside the game.

For publishers, BIG adds a new revenue stream that lives alongside ads and in-app purchases . Instead of relying only on player spend inside the game, publishers can monetize real-world commerce and increase player lifetime value through rewards players actually care about.

Brands benefit by driving real transactions inside a highly engaged gaming environment . BIG focuses on purchases—not impressions—giving brands measurable performance and incremental sales rather than just exposure.

The platform is built for fast deployment and scale . With a simple API or Unity SDK integration, publishers can quickly launch and access 2,200+ global brands and merchants  across mobile and desktop games.

How it works:
 Players buy or gift digital gift cards from brands they already use
 Players receive in-game rewards and virtual currency
 Publishers earn incremental revenue
 Brands gain real, measurable purchases

Name: ENdi App
Description:
ENdi is a comprehensive app developed to support users managing complex female health conditions, such as endometriosis, PCOS, adenomyosis, and PMDD. It offers advanced health journaling features, allowing users to log symptoms, emotions, pain levels, and daily activities. This data helps reveal patterns and triggers, providing valuable insights into individual health trends.

Through data-driven analysis, ENdi offers personalised insights, showing users how lifestyle factors correlate with symptoms. This empowers informed decisions and enhances communication with healthcare professionals. Users also benefit from medication and appointment management tools, ensuring a streamlined approach to treatment. Reminders for medications and an integrated appointment tracker keep health routines organised and efficient.

The app centralises medical history, providing a secure and easily accessible platform for records. Users can store and share information like past diagnoses, treatment plans, and surgical notes, which simplifies interactions with healthcare teams. Additionally, ENdi makes it simple to manage contacts, including healthcare providers and support networks, for quick access to essential resources.

ENdi prioritises data privacy and security, storing information securely in users' Apple iCloud accounts. If users choose to opt in, we collect anonymous data that is shared with medical research teams who are working towards treatments and a cure for endometriosis, ensuring privacy while contributing to vital research.

Overall, ENdi equips users with the tools to better understand and manage their health. By turning daily data into meaningful insights, it empowers users to take control of their wellness and improve their quality of life through informed, proactive care. Thousands are already transforming their health journeys with ENdi, using its innovative features to manage symptoms, track progress, and stay organised.

Name: A-Maze
Description:
A-Maze hjælper lærere, der gerne vil fremme børns læring gennem bevægelse i skolen ved at forsyne dem med et tidsbesparende plug ’n’ play værktøj, der er digitalt, datadrevet og intuitivt at bruge i undervisningen.

_____________________________________________

Alt for mange skoleelever er i dag inaktive. Lange skoledage præget af inaktivitet udfordrer både sundhed, trivsel og læring. Der er brug for at tænke nyt og innovativt for at ændre på det faktum, at over 50% af alle skoler ikke lever op til målsætningen om 45 minutters bevægelse på en almindelig skoledag. 
 
A-Maze’s mission er klar.

Vi hjælper skoler og lærere med at blive klædt på til at løse en opgave, som er afgørende for elevernes trivsel og læring. A-Maze’s app og brugerflade er udviklet målrettet til at fremme indlæring gennem bevægelse. 

Vores løsning giver lærerne et tidsbesparende plug ’n’ play værktøj, der er digitalt og intuitivt at bruge i undervisningen. Det kræver ingen forberedelse, og løsningen tager afsæt i læringsmålene i de centrale fag. Det er læring gennem bevægelse.
 
Det er derfor, vi siger, at A-Maze er skolens partner i bevægelse.

Name: George Quiz
Description:
Chez George Quiz, on réinvente le blind test musical 

George Quiz est une start-up belge qui transforme le blind test en véritable jeu de société. À jouer entre amis ou en famille, tu peux opter pour l’application mobile seule ou jouer avec la boîte de jeu pour encore plus de fun. 
Le jeu propose trois modes adaptés à toutes les envies : Rush pour les plus rapides, Focus pour ceux qui aiment se concentrer, et Classic pour une partie complète et animée.

 Grâce à notre algorithme intégré, chaque partie s’adapte aux joueurs : les extraits sont sélectionnés selon leur âge, leur nationalité ou leurs préférences musicales.Les joueurs peuvent aussi jouer avec des playlists thématiques (Girls Power, Films d’animation, Sous le soleil…) ou créer leur propre sélection en choisissant le genre, la décennie et la langue des morceaux.

 Et parce que le respect des artistes est essentiel à nos yeux, nous avons négocié des accords avec les sociétés de gestion de droits. Résultat : chaque morceau diffusé dans le jeu est rémunéré. Une première dans l’univers du blind test.

 George Quiz est soutenu par finance&invest.brussels et un pool d’investisseurs privés. Depuis notre lancement, nous avons déjà conquis des milliers de joueurs en Belgique et en France… et ce n’est que le début !

Name: SAFEPARTY!
Description:
What Is SAFEPARTY!?

SAFEPARTY! is a safety trivia game designed to change how safety training is learned—and remembered.

Traditional safety training is often forgettable. SAFEPARTY! flips the script by creating a fun, interactive game environment that challenges players to test their safety knowledge while actually enjoying the process.

Players choose from multiple safety categories, including:

Home Safety
Construction Safety
General Industry Safety
Public Safety
Professional Certifications (CSP & ASP prep)

Each question is intentionally designed to improve real-world safety awareness, reinforce smart decision-making, and help prevent injuries and illnesses—at work and at home.

SAFEPARTY! can be played solo or in teams, making it perfect for classrooms, workplaces, safety meetings, and social gatherings. Players compete to earn points, climb the leaderboard, and achieve the coveted Gold Party Hat—officially crowning them a SAFEPARTY! Host.

Gather as many points as possible to unlock achievements and reach Party Legend Level, where safety knowledge meets ultimate bragging rights. Compete, collaborate, and learn together in a high-energy, party-style experience that keeps people engaged and coming back for more.

Empowering Minds, Igniting Futures: Innovate, Educate, Play"

Ideaforage is an Innovation Design Company that believes in unleashing the power of Ideas to advance the Human Experience through Innovative Products, Services, and Entrepreneurship. Vision 

A World with Inclusive and Equitable Quality Education to Promote Lifelong learning opportunities for all. 

Mission 

Ideaforage is on the mission to democratize experiential playful learning among 5% of the Kinesthics learners in the world to promote equity by Creating and Deploying Innovative Educational Products, Solutions, and Services.

Problem

Kinesthetic learners make up just 5 percent of the population and are a bit more complex than other types of learners and communicators. 

Our Target SDG - Target 4.8 | Build and upgrade education facilities that are child, disability, and gender sensitive and provide safe, non-violent, inclusive, and effective learning environments for all. 

The publisher expects the market to reach US$ 26.68 Billion by 2027, exhibiting a CAGR of 12.16% during 2021-2027. In India it is expected to show an annual growth rate (CAGR 2022-2027) of 8.79%, resulting in a projected market volume of US$29.49m by 2027.

Why do we exist?

Kinaesthetic is learning through movement or by tactile (touch) memory. They learn best by ‘doing’. For this reason, they can struggle with memoizing lists or have difficulty spelling. It has nothing to do with the Intelligence or capacity to learn. They just had to tackle the information differently and need "stress-free Content".

Name: Doddle
Description:
We're excited to share with you a new daily word game called Doddle. If you love word games, this is one you won't want to miss.

Available in 10 languages, Doddle is an addictive game that challenges you to create as many words as possible using 14 random letters. The letters are revealed 1 by 1, and have to be placed anywhere on a 5 by 5 grid, using them to form words horizontally, or vertically.

The best part about Doddle is that it's a daily game, with a leaderboard, and competition, with scores and ranks announced each day on socials. 

Every day, you'll receive a new set of 14 letters to create new words. This means you can challenge yourself every day and improve your vocabulary skills while having fun.

Doddle is located at www.doddle.me, and it's free to play. You can also sign up for an account to keep track of your scores and compete with other players. The game is perfect for anyone who loves words, from beginners to experts.

Playing Doddle is not only fun, but it's also a great way to keep your brain sharp and improve your language skills. It's a fantastic way to unwind after a long day or to pass the time during your commute.

So why not give Doddle a try? Head over to www.doddle.me, and start playing today. Don't forget to share it with your friends and family too!

Thank you for your attention, and happy gaming!

Name: Garden of Dreams
Description:
What is Garden of dreams and why are we here?
Let's start with the story of our founder, which inspired us to create THE GARDEN
Eugene GrishakoFF (or John as he is called internationally) is the inspiration to it all. 
His biggest dream in childhood was to create games. Just like thousands or millions of kids or adolescents, who were totally captured by the gaming world, dreaming that one day they would make their own game, John may be considered as the brightest example whose dreams came true. 

When he started his way in gaming, he didn’t know anything about the development and surely it didn’t work at all from the start, which caused losses of about 20k $, which he made with his other entrepreneurships. But having a very strong background in business in general, he wouldn’t give up, and eventually, his first game made a major breakthrough bringing him the revenue, which covered all his expenses and brought him money. 
Now John has his own gamedev studio, which is quite successful! 
But he decided to take it further! 
Keeping in mind his thorny way to the stars, John has decided to create a Gamedev club, which unites the experts, amateurs, enthusiasts, beginners, game lovers, who would like to make their way in the game dev industry, but they (just like John himself), don’t know where to start, and how to approach it. 
In the gamedev club (https://gamedev-club.ru/), our experienced experts in the fields of development, art, business processes, legal support, accountancy, HR, give advice to those, who have decided to pursue their career in GAMEDEV. 
We also have a few youtube channels that promote the knowledge in the sphere, share ideas, news, trends, showing interesting cases and featuring amazing speakers, who talk about their experience, their story and provide some knowledge. (https://www.youtube.com/c/365GameDevBlog)
It is high time to step out in the wider world and help everyone, who has passion for the games and their own story! Let’s do it together!

Description:

By collecting tracks from over 150 diverse sources,  including streaming platforms, DJs, radio stations, blogs, and magazines, Playlo brings together the best music across 18 different genres. 

The app then creates a competition where users anonymously rate tracks. If a user knows a great song, they can submit it and join the game. At the end of the month, if their song makes it to the top 10, they can win up to $1,000. 

To make the game unpredictable and to prevent Taylor Swift from winning all the time, the algorithm is designed to favor underground music.

Name: Escape This! GmbH
Description:
Escape This! - Der digitale Outdoor Escape Room in deiner Stadt!

Willkommen bei Escape This! – dem Escape Room der Zukunft! Unser Escape Room verschmilzt geschickt die physische und digitale Welt, um ein einzigartiges Abenteuer zu schaffen. Begeben Sie sich mit Ihrem Team auf eine Reise in eine geheimnisvolle Welt, in der Sie Rätsel lösen, Codes knacken und versteckte Botschaften entschlüsseln müssen, um das ultimative Ziel zu erreichen.

Highlights:

Digitale Innovation: Dieser Escape Room nutzt modernste Technologie, um eine immersive Erfahrung zu schaffen. Sie werden in eine Welt voller interaktiver digitaler Rätsel eintauchen, die sowohl Herausforderung als auch Spaß bieten.

Mehrere Szenarien: Wählen Sie aus verschiedenen Szenarien, die von einem Portal der Wildnis bis zu einem geheimen Cyber-Angriff reichen. Jedes Szenario bietet eine einzigartige Handlung und Rätsel, die es zu lösen gilt.

Teamarbeit: "Escape This!" ist für Gruppen konzipiert. Zusammenarbeit und Kommunikation sind entscheidend, um die Herausforderungen zu meistern. Nur wenn Ihr Team zusammenarbeitet, können Sie entkommen!

Zeitdruck: Die Uhr tickt! Sie haben eine begrenzte Zeit, um die Rätsel zu lösen und zu entkommen. Der Nervenkitzel des Wettlaufs gegen die Zeit macht das Erlebnis noch aufregender.


Lassen Sie sich von unseren Rätseln fesseln und in eine neue Welt katapultieren.

Name: FunFlow (Мобильные игровые решения)
Description:
FunFlow - разработчик мобильных игр и приложений. Совместно с крупными издателями мы разработали игры с дневной аудиторией более 1 млн игроков. В нашей команде более 150 сотрудников, которые принимали участие в создании продуктов ставшими лучшими в App Store и Google Play.

В работе мы акцентируем свое внимание на качестве. Только идеальный продукт способен принести результат - удовольствие пользователей, финансовый успех и признание рынка. 

Миссия и ценности
FunFlow создает высококачественные и технологичные продукты, вызывающие удовольствие от их создания и использования. Мы внимательны к мелочам, инициативны, результативны и уверены в своих силах. Именно эти ценности мы поддерживаем в нашей корпоративной культуре.

Команда
Мы верим, что FunFlow - пространство возможностей для всех. И в каждом заложен потенциал эти возможности реализовать. Окружающий мир переменчив и порой преподносит новые сюрпризы. В меняющихся обстоятельствах компания дает каждому сотруднику уверенность в завтрашнем дне, помогает ему раскрыть свой потенциал и двигаться навстречу новым перспективам вместе с сильной командой. Мы выделяем неравнодушие и сотрудничество как ключевые драйверы нашей совместной работы.

Карьера
В компании работают талантливые люди, которым важен профессиональный рост и успех всей компании. Мы уделяем внимание развитию сотрудников, поддерживая их желание учиться. Внедряем программы развития для руководителей и линейного персонала, оплачиваем посещение ключевых конференций индустрии и профессиональные курсы. Наши сотрудники вырастают до руководителей направления, экспертов продукта и совершенствуются профессионально: рост зависит от результата, а не от стажа. Те, кто готов к большим задачам и готов разделить с нами стремление приносить радость миллионам игроков, могут присоединиться к нашей команде. 

Наши преимущества
Нас объединяет не офис или рабочее время, а общие интересы и желание создавать хорошие продукты, которые нам нравится делать вместе.

 What we do (and how we do it differently)

 Got a mobile game idea or prototype?

Let’s build something players can’t put down.

" Aileler için birlikte öğrenme ve eğlenme zamanı! Funly, aile bireylerinin birlikte vakit geçirebileceği, birlikte öğrenebileceği ve birlikte büyüyebileceği etkinlikler ve kaynaklar sunar. Aileler için özel olarak tasarlanmış programlarımızla, her anı değerli kılın."

Name: Life2app / AI web3 map / raising $500k
Description:
Life2app is a mobile Unity-based game.

We at Life2app want to help people make their lives more interesting, find new friends and let them make some money.
Businesses are always looking for new customers and employees and ready to pay for them.
Life2app connects people and businesses and solves their problems.

- How it works -
Imagine Google Maps that rewards you for what you do in real life.
* Walk or drive; 
* Visit stores, cafes and other places, scan QRs there;
* Meet your friends; 
* Work, study or just stay at home;
* Do simple quest-like tasks.
We call it live2earn.

- Business model -
And what about money? Businesses pay us for customers and employees. We share the profits with players. It’s simple.
If you want customers to come into your store - place a QR at the checkout.
If you want customers to see a certain place on your website or video - place a QR there.
Say NO to Ineffective ads. Pay only for those who scanned the QR.
Create simple tasks for unskilled workers: promoter, cleaner, mystery shopper, etc. Other users will be able to supervise the work. 

- Market -
Market is huge. Even if we get 1% of the physical retail market we’ll receive about 2 billion dollars a year. Plus e-commerce and other online businesses.

- Our benefits -
We are definitely better than others. 
Life2app has map integration,
offline and online business integration,
we are developing new live2earn game mechanics instead of boring move2earn
and we have multiplayer to connect players. 

- Global growth -
Players can launch the Life2app anywhere in the world and start building a game universe around them. They add new players and places themselves. We reward them.

Wyobraź sobie, że odkrywanie miasta może być ekscytującą grą, która jednocześnie integruje zespół i dostarcza niezapomnianych wrażeń. Trawell to innowacyjna aplikacja mobilna, która łączy funkcje przewodnika turystycznego i gry miejskiej, oferując użytkownikom unikalne i angażujące doświadczenia.

Dla indywidualnych użytkowników Trawell jest nieocenionym towarzyszem podróży, który dostosowuje trasy i wyzwania do ich preferencji. Nasza aplikacja nie tylko lokalizuje najbliższe atrakcje turystyczne, ale także proponuje fascynujące ciekawostki oraz wyzwania, które po ukończeniu nagradzają punktami. Dzięki Trawell, każda podróż staje się przygodą pełną niespodzianek.

Nasze rozwiązanie jest również idealne dla firm poszukujących nowoczesnych metod integracji pracowników. Trawell dostarcza narzędzie do organizacji gier miejskich, które wzmacniają ducha zespołu i budują relacje w sposób kreatywny i interaktywny. Gry miejskie organizowane przez naszą aplikację to doskonały sposób na zacieśnienie więzi między pracownikami, poprawę komunikacji i motywacji w zespole.

Dołącz do nas i odkryj, jak Trawell może wzbogacić Twoje doświadczenia podróżnicze i zintegrować Twój zespół w sposób, jakiego jeszcze nie doświadczyłeś!

이 이름은 '무모하고 대담하다'라는 뜻의 영단어인 OVERDARE로, 
발음이 비슷한 '저기 어딘가(Over there)'라는 뜻도 가지고 있습니다.

우리는 기존에 없던 모바일 인터렉티브 UGC(사용자 제작 콘텐츠) 플랫폼을 만들기 위해 대담한 용기를 가지고 나아가는 것을 목표로 합니다.

OVERDARE는 액션 RPG, 스포츠 게임, 슈터 게임 등 다양한 게임을 제작할 수 있는 
모바일 기반의 UGC 플랫폼입니다.
이용자들은 생성형 AI와 언리얼 5 엔진을 활용하여 양질의 콘텐츠를 손쉽게 제작할 수 있습니다. 
뿐만 아니라 게임 제작 외에도 아바타 커스터마이징, 채팅 등 다양한 소셜 활동도 가능합니다.

또한, 메타버스 공간에서 콘텐츠 크리에이터가 다양한 저작물을 창작하면, 이용자들이 해당 저작물을 구매하고 소하는 방식의 C2E(Create-to-Earn) 시스템을 도입하였습니다.
저작물 거래는 NFT와 블록체인을 기반으로 이루어지며, 모든 거래 내역은 블록체인에 기록되어 거래와 정산의 투명성과 신뢰성을 높였습니다.

PUBG를 만든 크래프톤의 기술력과 제페토를 만든 네이버제트의 경험이 만나, 지금껏 경험하지 못했던 다채로운 즐거움이 가득한 새로운 플랫폼이 탄생할 거라 굳게 믿고 있습니다.

Name: Numerin Mastermind: crack the code
Description:
Numerin is a new addictive code breaking puzzle game where the players have to crack a 4 digits code in up to 8 attempts using the logic, and maybe a bit of luck too!

It's a modern adaptation of the classic board game called Mastermind. A real challenging and entertaining game where you will train your brain.

Think you're smart? Find out how smart you really are!

Numerin Mastermind is completely FREE to play, enjoy now an infinite number of challenging puzzles and hours of brain teasers!

* SIMPLE RULES:
=> Players have to crack the 4 digit secret code in up to 8 attempts. You receive a hint after each one to help you guess it:
GREEN: Correct number in the correct position
YELLOW: Correct number in a wrong position
EMPTY: Wrong number
=> The order of colors doesn’t correspond to the order of the chosen digits. By default the hints show the green ones first, then the yellow ones and finally the empty ones.
=> Duplicate digits are not allowed

* DIFFERENT MODES:
=> Offline: Practice without a timer. It’s perfect to play without pressure and train your skills.
=> Online: You may challenge and compete with opponents to find who faster code solver is!
=> Daily challenge: There's a unique World daily code with the possibility of sharing the results with the community!

* REWARDS: win coups and be the best!

* INTERFACE: easy and intuitive with great graphics and exciting sound effect

🡫 DOWNLOAD HERE 🡫
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.CosmicGames.Numerin

Contact: numeringame@gmail.com

Offroad Dominator is a Truck Simulator game. Key features of the game is -
• Enjoy high-quality 3D graphics and exciting gameplay.
• Drive a variety of trucks, each with its own unique characteristics.
• Experience different weather systems, including snow, rain, and sunshine.
• Immerse yourself in stunning visuals and realistic environments.
• Navigate through different seasons, from winter to summer.
• Explore multiple environments with a day and night cycle.
• Make use of fuel stations and road trains.
• Travel through various climate locations, including deserts, mountains, and cities in Europe and the USA.
• Choose between manual transmission with H-Shifter and Clutch or opt for improved controls such as tilt steering, buttons, or a virtual steering wheel.
• Witness visual and mechanical damage to vehicles, adding a touch of realism to your gameplay.
• Take on dirt roads with bumps for an enhanced sense of reality and enjoyment.
• Easy-to-learn controls for a smooth gaming experience.
• Utilize GPS for navigation assistance.
• Turn the engine on or off as needed.
• Collect coins to unlock additional vehicles.
• Customize your truck with various options such as wheels, doors, tires, and steering.

BlitzRun is a Play-to-Earn (P2E) endless running game will be build on the Solana blockchain, where players control an Ape character, collect $LZAPE tokens, and use them to buy skins and in-game items. These tokens will later be used to claim an airdrop when the LazyApe cryptocurrency launches.

The game features a leaderboard system, rewarding top players with exclusive prizes, including merchandise. With Web3 integration, BlitzRun allows players to connect their wallets, earn rewards, and participate in the growing LazyApe Ecosystem.

Key Features:
	•	Earn $LZAPE tokens while playing.
	•	Buy NFT skins & power-ups.
	•	Compete on leaderboards for exclusive rewards.
	•	Web3 wallet integration for airdrops & token utility.
	•	Fair-play AI system to prevent exploits.

BlitzRun is designed to build a strong community before the LazyApe token launch, making it an exciting Web3 gaming experience!

Name: LUCIO APP
Description:
LUCIO is a social gaming platform that uses shared interests, experiences, and proximity to help you find your people wherever life takes you. LUCIO does this by seamlessly combining geolocation matching algorithms, games, and partnerships with local businesses to allow users to play, connect and explore with each other:

PLAY: Once connected, users can play asynchronous turn-based games through the chat. They can also meet through gameplay within the LUCIO game world. Users are sorted into multiplayer rooms where they can play with others who are close to them in age and location- making it easy to take any connections made offline. 

CONNECT: LUCIO makes it easier to connect with others who share similar interests, values, lifestyles, and more. Using AI, compatibility scores will be displayed on other people's profiles on the community board. By including personality tests, users can find even more ways to connect.

EXPLORE: LUCIO intends to supplement reality, not replace it. Therefore, by playing games, users are able to unlock discounts and deals to meet offline and explore local businesses- strengthening their connections through shared experiences, while simultaneously helping their local communities thrive. 

For more information, please visit www.lucioapp.com. 

Register for launch updates: https://bit.ly/3TbWJNx
We're hiring! If interested in joining the LUCIO team, please email: victoria@lucioapp.com

Name: Gravity Force
Description:
The game demonstrates how the gravity force is working between the space objects.

Background from physics:
1. The gravity force is getting bigger when the distance between the objects is decreasing, and the force is getting smaller when the distance is increasing.

2. The gravity force also depends on the mass of the space objects, so the objects with bigger mass create stronger gravity fields.

Playing instructions
- When you touch the screen with a finger, the touch point immediately becomes an object with mass.

- It has much bigger mass than the freely flying asteroids and is visualized as a black hole.

- The goal of each level is to collect 137 flying asteroids into the screen, using the gravity force of your finger.

- During the play, you keep or move your finger on the screen and observe how the gravity force is moving the objects.

- If you move your finger to cross the orbit of an asteroid you could see the effect of gravity force, which changes the direction and the speed of the asteroid.

- After each level the asteroids become faster and the space they are flying in is increasing.

Features
- Amazing graphical assets (asteroids, black holes and backgrounds) in 4 different color themes (purple, pink, green, red).

- Increasing difficulties.

- Supports different color palettes for different tastes.

Ebeveyn 360 Yazılım A.Ş., Teknopark Ankara’da konumlanan, çocukların bilişsel, duygusal ve fiziksel gelişimini desteklemeye odaklanan yenilikçi dijital çözümler geliştiren bir teknoloji şirketidir.

Amiral ürünümüz ZUGI, 5000’den fazla soru, interaktif aktiviteler ve akademik videolarla çocuklara eğlenceli bir öğrenme yolculuğu sunar. Bilimsel temellere dayalı pedagojik yapısıyla yalnızca çocukların değil, ailelerin de sürece aktif ve bilinçli katılımını sağlar. Uzman akademik kadromuzun hazırladığı içerikler; dikkat, bellek, muhakeme, görsel-uzamsal beceri ve eleştirel düşünme gibi kritik gelişim alanlarında ölçülebilir ilerleme imkânı yaratır.

Aile Akademisi modülümüzle ebeveynler; uzman seminerlerinden kitap önerilerine, rehber içeriklerden gelişimsel yönlendirmelere kadar geniş bir yelpazede destek alır. Böylece çocuklarının gelişim serüvenine bilinçli, güvenli ve etkin bir şekilde eşlik ederler.

Ebeveyn 360 olarak, teknolojiyi çocuklar için faydalı, güvenli ve sağlıklı hale getiriyoruz. Tüm özelliklerimizi aile odaklı, pedagojik ilkelere uygun ve gelişimsel hedeflere yönelik biçimde tasarlıyoruz.

Dijital eğitim çözümlerimiz sayesinde, çocukların potansiyellerini açığa çıkarıyor; ebeveynlere ise bu yolculukta güvenilir bir rehberlik sunuyoruz.

Name: TriviaLinked
Description:
Trivia games are boring. You make an account, answer clunky questions, get hit with nonstop ads (seriously, where is that close button for the popups?!), and bear with slow, ugly interfaces. Oh, and none of your friends want to play with you...  

Say goodbye to #boring trivia, and say hello to TriviaLinked, a beautiful new daily puzzle for trivia teams, family bonding, and work besties (enemies?) that literally has no questions. How is that even possible?

Here's an example. Instead of answering the question "Paris is the capital of which European country?", you'll simply try to connect Paris to France. Then, you'll connect France to something like Baguette. Then Baguette to some other idea. And so on! There's one handcrafted puzzle every day, with topics ranging from Pop Culture and Music to Geography and Sports.

The best part: you can enjoy the daily competition without the hassle of making an account or sitting through unbearable ads. Just pure puzzle fun.

There is a reason TriviaLinked was named "one of the best daily challenges games you can find on the App Store" and a Best Mobile Game of 2025 by Pocket Gamer Magazine.

Here are just a few things that will make TL your go-to home for daily puzzle vibes:

* Beautiful, sleek, and thoughtful interface that's easy to enjoy and share with friends
* A handcrafted daily puzzle that is some combination of addicting and meditative (yes, there is a Zen Mode)
* The Winner's Circle, featuring the Top Players Globally and in your Groups
* Stat-tracking with nifty subject tokens, performance badges, and a simple progression system
* Profile customization
* Frequent feature updates, bug fixes, and adjustments based on your feedback
* Did we mention no accounts, no ads, and no personal data collected?

With 30,000+ games played, this is just the beginning of a new way to play trivia. Come join the fun on TriviaLinked!

Name: Crypto Fight Club
Description:
Crypto Fight Club (CFC) is a new NFT-enabled game which allows players to battle one another or compete in championships. It's similar to the popular trading card games from the 1990s but instead of cards, Crypto Fight Club items and fighters consist of NFTs. Also, the game is powered by its own native token ($FIGHT). CFC allows players to stake their native currency in an NFT which represents their fighter on BSC (Binance Smart Chain). Players can then battle each other or complete training objectives to earn more tokens and purchase more powerful fighters and/or enhance their stats. 

Each fighter requires a predefined amount of $FIGHT to be staked inside their NFT, allowing the player to gain more $FIGHT tokens over time and also enhance that particular fighter's stats. The fighter's stats are based on a Proof-of-Wait (PoW8) function; where holders earn interest based on delayed gratification. Longer and larger stakes will not only help improve the fighters ability to perform but also reward you with more $FIGHT.

Similar to real fighters in reality, NFT boxers and martial artists train and spar in the ring. They also learn new abilities by training hard every day to become a world champion. Training objectives can be completed in training mode to earn more $Fight or fight against other players in battle mode. Playing during your training time limits your ability to fight against opponents and earn. Fighting another person one-on-one is where the real glory awaits after the other player has been knocked out. 

Rules of the Crypto Fight Club:

1. You talk about Crypto Fight Club.

2. You talk about Crypto Fight Club.

3. If someone yells “END STAKE”, before their initial time lock is up, their stake is penalized.

4. Only two fighters to a fight.

5. Multiple fights at a time.

6. Equip your fighter with perks and assets.

7. Fights will go on as long as they’re agreed upon.

8. Do not impersonate our team members or scam future fighters.

Description:
Peakeey English est un jeu de simulation de vie quotidienne et d’aventure. Une manière passionnante d’apprendre une langue et de découvrir la culture des pays anglophones.

En tant que détective privé, vous mènerez l’enquête sur des phénomènes inexpliqués. Pour réussir cette mission en toute discrétion, vous devrez vous construire une nouvelle identité et vivre une deuxième vie : trouver un travail, faire connaissance avec la population, connaître la culture du pays pour pouvoir passer inaperçu. 

Résolvez des mini-quêtes et trouvez des solutions. Attention, vos choix auront des conséquences sur votre aventure.

Vivez une expérience unique dans un monde accueillant. Adapté pour tout public, la conception du jeu pourra vous offrir un apprentissage sur mesure.

Peakeey English, une nouvelle façon personnalisée de pratiquer une langue !

Name: Alpha Studios
Description:
Mobile Game Development Services by Alpha Studios

At Alpha Studios, we are passionate about creating immersive and engaging mobile games that captivate players and leave a lasting impression. Our team of experienced developers, designers, and artists are dedicated to delivering top-notch gaming experiences that stand out in the competitive mobile gaming market.

Our Services Include:

 Full-Cycle Game Development
From concept to launch, we handle every stage of the game development process, ensuring your vision comes to life with precision and creativity.

 Game Design & Art
Our talented designers and artists craft stunning visuals, intuitive interfaces, and engaging gameplay mechanics that keep players coming back for more.

 Prototyping & Concept Development
Got an idea? We help refine and develop your game concept, turning your creative vision into a tangible prototype ready for production.

 Game Optimization & Testing
We ensure your game runs smoothly across various devices with rigorous testing and optimization, providing a seamless experience for players.

 Cross-Platform Development
Whether it’s iOS or Android, we create games that perform beautifully across all platforms, reaching a wider audience.

 Monetization Strategy & Integration
We help you maximize your game's revenue potential with effective monetization strategies, including in-app purchases, ads, and premium content.

 Live Operations & Updates
Post-launch, we provide ongoing support with updates, content additions, and live operations to keep your game fresh and engaging.

Partner with Alpha Studios, and let's create something amazing together! Whether you're looking to develop a casual mobile game, an intense action-packed adventure, or anything in between, we're here to turn your ideas into reality.

Check out the services page to see examples of my work and to learn more about my services.

Name: WhosZat
Description:
𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐙𝐚𝐭 is a pocket directory app that helps put names with faces. 

Do you have a hard time remembering names? We live busy lives and names don't always stick around after a first interaction. The less frequent the contact with a person, the more likely we are to forget their name. 

𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐙𝐚𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩.

Build your directory using the grouping strategy. Grouping strategy means categorizing your relationships into specific groups, much like a contact management database would.

Take the group from your local chamber of commerce: You make acquaintances and talk small talk, but soon you start to mix up or forget names entirely. Grouping them into a "Chamber Group" category helps consolidate the memorization process so you can recall names more quickly.

Even better than a name? A name plus a photo. That way, before walking into your chamber meeting, you simply pull out your phone and review the names and faces in that category.

Guess what else helps with memory consolidation? Quizzes.
Guess what 𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐙𝐚𝐭 is equipped to do? Quiz you. 

𝐕𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐳𝐚𝐭.𝐜𝐨𝐦/𝐝𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐝 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨𝐝𝐚𝐲.

Name: Clinical Game Jam
Description:
Clinical Game Jam – Where Clinicians Code for Change 

The Clinical Game Jam is a unique, in-person, one-day event bringing together clinicians, health innovators, and digital creatives to design and prototype games that address urgent Core20PLUS5 health priorities for children and young people.

We harness the power of Rosebud AI  and other creative tools so that no coding experience is needed — if you can imagine it, you can build it. Whether it’s a mini-game to teach asthma inhaler skills, a narrative to improve oral health habits, or a playful quest supporting mental wellbeing, every idea aims to inspire, educate, and improve health equity.

Our Mission:
To turn frontline clinical insights into playful, impactful solutions that help reduce health inequalities, starting with issues like:
 Asthma
 Diabetes
 Epilepsy
 Oral health
 Mental health

What We Offer:
 A collaborative, creative environment
 Rapid game prototyping with AI tools
 Focus on real-world clinical challenges
 Live showcases of participant creations

Upcoming Events:
 Wilmslow Health Centre, Cheshire – 28 September 2025
 St Andrews Health Centre, London – November 2025 (Date TBA)

Join us to connect, create, and code for a healthier future.
Because sometimes, the best way to solve serious problems is to play.

Description:
BrainyFred is a highly personalized social-emotional learning multiverse designed for children aged 6-12.

We provide a safe space for kids to develop critical life skills: from managing their thoughts, improving focus, and understanding others' feelings to critical thinking, deduction, and creativity.

PLAY: Explore the world of Freddieverse, furnish Your Safe Place, and go on missions with Freddie the Ferret and his friends.

IMPROVE: Failed a task? A Magical Elusive Cafe appears, with neuro-practices to help you try a different approach and succeed.

TALK: Feel sad or have some news to share? AI-powered animated Freddie is there to chat, safe and private.

With BrainyFred, kids will:
 Gain instant emotional support.
 Learn to manage big emotions and express themselves confidently.
 Understand their body's signals to proactively reduce stress.

No two paths through the never-ending world of Freddieverse are the same, because no two children are alike.


BrainyFred understands each child's unique blend of intelligences, inspired by Howard Gardner's Multiple Intelligences Theory and an innovative concept of Polyintelligence.

With relatable characters, immersive experiences, and a constant, strong shift of focus from digital to real life, we're pioneering a new era of learning – making kids happier, more confident, and ready for the future.

Description:
Glow Job – The Power Platform for the Entire Beauty Industry
Glow Job is the all-in-one networking, booking, and marketplace app created for the beauty industry. From top clinics and salons to students just starting out, it’s where businesses, creatives, models, and educators connect, grow, and glow together.

Built for aestheticians, body sculptors, hair stylists, nail techs, PMU artists, clinics, photographers, content creators, academies and beauty students, Glow Job is the pink-powered space where opportunity meets action.

 What Glow Job Does:
• Connects beauty businesses with models for paid or collab treatments
• Builds partnerships across the industry from lash techs to skin clinics to student stylists
• Offers a marketplace to buy and sell second-hand machines, tools, and stock
• Links up photographers and content creators with beauty brands and treatments
• Helps beauty academies find students and vice versa
• Supports visibility and bookings with in-app promotion, calendars, availability, and DMs
• Gives beauty students a real-world network to find experience, placements, and mentorship

 For Beauty Students and Academies:
Glow Job is your launchpad. Find real clinics to shadow, models to practice on, and jobs to apply for. For academies, it’s a streamlined way to promote courses, build brand awareness, and connect with emerging talent.

 Why Glow Job?
Because the beauty industry deserves more than group chats and spreadsheets. Whether you’re booking a model, selling a machine, hiring a student, or launching your next offer, Glow Job helps you do it faster, smarter, and with way more glow.

No awkward messages. No messy threads. Just pure connections, done properly.

La nostra missione opera su due fronti complementari:

Per i tifosi: Creiamo uno spazio ufficiale dove la voce del tifoso finalmente conta, dove chi prima urlava inascoltato ora può influenzare concretamente il dibattito tattico, dove le intuizioni e le opinioni ricevono la considerazione che meritano, e dove la passione per il proprio club si esprime attraverso un confronto costruttivo che valorizza la vera competenza calcistica.

Per i club: Forniamo una soluzione all'avanguardia che intensifica il legame con i propri tifosi partita dopo partita, genera comprensione approfondita delle loro preferenze, crea inedite opportunità di business durante i momenti di massimo coinvolgimento, il tutto con un'implementazione rapida ed economicamente vantaggiosa.

Tato forma inovativního vzdělávání již celosvětové sklízí jeden úspěch za druhým, nabírá na oblibě a vládne nad klasickým konceptem jak u měkkých dovedností (obchodní, manažerské), tak u tvrdých dovedností (firemní procesy, příprava na zkoušky, např. pro získání řidičského oprávnění či interní firemní směrnice). Být o krok napřed před ostatními, využít naplno potenciál zaměstnanců společnosti, outsourcing – to jsou hlavní výzvy tohoto tisíciletí, které čas nezastaví.

ChildSafe.dev provides 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝗰𝘆-𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁 𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗱 𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗲𝘁𝘆 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 for platforms, apps, and digital products used by minors.

Our flagship system, 𝗥𝗼𝘀𝗲𝗦𝗵𝗶𝗲𝗹𝗱𝗧𝗠, operates 𝗼𝗻-𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲, enabling 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹-𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗼𝗳 𝗴𝗿𝗼𝗼𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗴, 𝗮𝗯𝘂𝘀𝗲, and 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗼𝗶𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗸𝘀 while preserving privacy by design.

We help organizations implement Safety-by-Design, build 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁 and 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗳𝗿𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀, and integrate ethical, scalable child protection infrastructure.

Child safety is no longer optional. It is 𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗹, 𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹, and 𝘁𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹.

ChildSafe.dev works with 𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺 𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗧𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁 & 𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲𝘁𝘆 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺𝘀, and 𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝗰𝘆 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗵𝗼𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀 to build safer digital environments for children.

Name: Boxed Up
Description:
Our Story
Boxed Up was created with a simple goal: to give sneaker enthusiasts a way to enjoy the excitement of exclusive drops and collections, right from their phone. What started as a small project has grown into a vibrant platform loved by sneakerheads worldwide, offering unique features, rare virtual sneakers, and a dynamic community that shares the same passion.

Our Community
At the heart of Boxed Up is our incredible community. With thousands of dedicated members connecting through our Discord server, we’ve built a space where players can trade, share tips, and celebrate their collections. Our community isn’t just a part of Boxed Up; it’s the foundation. We believe the best part of collecting sneakers is sharing that experience with others.

Our Mission
We strive to offer more than just a game. Boxed Up is an immersive sneaker culture experience that reflects the thrill of real-life sneaker hunting. We’re constantly evolving, adding new features and content to keep the game exciting, competitive, and fun for our community.

Why Choose Mindpe App? 
1. India`s leading fantasy quiz app

4. Wide range subjects covered for quizzes

What is unique about Mindpe fantasy quiz app? 

1. Learning is put to earning - if you have knowledge of any thing be it academic or trivial or technical, now you can put the knowledge to earn you existing cash rewards with Mindpe. 

2. Wide range of selections covered - you can get contest on Current Affairs, History , Polity ,Geography , International relations, Ecology , Bollywood , Sports , Politics and others 

3. Reliability - Mindpe application is built by a team which has a deep understanding of user behavior and it is trusted by many users. 

4. Global Ranking - Every Time you attempt a contest, you get rank among like minded contestants 

5. Invite friends - You can bring your friends and family on Mindpe and earn attractive cash bonus when they play a contest

Name: ROHO-ATU
Description:
À quel moment devient-on vraiment adulte ?

Nous vivons dans un monde rempli d’hommes et de femmes qui ont grandi en âge,
mais pas toujours en conscience.

On apprend à travailler, à réussir, à tenir un rôle.
Rarement à se connaître.
Rarement à affronter ce que l’on fuit.

Alors on porte des masques.

Masque de contrôle.
Masque de réussite.
Masque de dureté.

Et on appelle cela : être adulte.

ROHO est né de cette fracture.

ROHO n’est pas un simple récit.
C’est une légende afrofuturiste initiatique qui explore la maturité,
la responsabilité
et l’équilibre — intérieur comme collectif.

Dans cet univers, le monde ne vacille pas à cause de l’enfance,
mais à cause d’adultes inachevés.

ROHO n’est pas un héros.
Il est un miroir.

Chaque masque est une épreuve.
Chaque épreuve est une confrontation.
Chaque confrontation est une invitation à grandir.

 L’ORDRE DES GARDIENS

Autour de ROHO est né l’Ordre des Gardiens.

Un espace pour celles et ceux qui refusent de confondre âge et maturité.
Un lieu symbolique pour questionner ses masques,
ses responsabilités,
et sa place dans l’équilibre du monde.

On n’entre pas dans l’Ordre pour être parfait.
On y entre pour rester conscient.

La légende commence quand les masques tombent.

 Entre dans l’Ordre.

Name: Fiesta Online
Description:
Fiesta; Aileniz, arkadaşlarınız, yeni tanıdıklarınız ve hatta hiç tanımadıklarınızla harika sohbetler başlatmanıza yardımcı olacak şekilde tasarlanmış bir uygulamadır. Bu eğlenceli ve ilgi çekici oyunları  bir partide, yolculukta veya bir sonraki toplanmanızda ortamı ısıtmak için kullanabilirsiniz. Hatta en beğendiğiniz kartları sosyal medyada paylaşabilirsiniz. En yakınınızdakilerle unutulmaz sohbetler yaratacak ve hiç beklemediğiniz kişilerle gerçekten bağlantı kuracaksınız. Burada herkes için bir şeyler var.
Uygulamanın özellikleri şunlardır:
* Klasik, Kız Kıza, Doğruluk Mu Cesaret Mi?, +18, Ben Hiç, Anlat Bakalım, Romantik, Tanışmış Mıydık?, Erkek Erkeğe ve Yaramaz gibi birçok harika oyun. Yeni konularla taze tutacağız.
* 100’den fazla ücretsiz Fiesta Oyun Kartı
* Uygulama içi satın alımlarla 1000’den fazla karta erişim
* Neredeyse tüm oyunlara kendi kartınızı ekleyin
* Oyunları sosyal medyada kolayca paylaşın
İşte birkaç öne çıkan özellik:
* Klasik- Siz ve arkadaşlarınızın gün içinde karşılaştığında yapacağı seçimleri keşfetmenin eğlenceli  bir yolu.
* Kız Kıza- Kadınlar olarak harika şeyler gördünüz ve yaptınız. Kızlarla iz bırakan bir oyun oynamaya ve yeni harikalar yaratmaya hazır olun.
* Doğruluk Mu Cesaret Mi?- Herkes hakkında merakınızı giderin.
* +18- Cinsellik hakkında konuşun veya kozlarınızı ortaya dökün. Bayılacaksınız, biz öyle düşünüyoruz!
* Ben Hiç- Samimi bir ortamda eğlenceli bir itiraf deneyimi yaşayın! 
* Anlat Bakalım- Kelime daarcığınızı test etmenize yarayan eğlenceli  bir Taboo oyunu.
* Romantik- Partnerinizle tatlı bir vakit geçirebilmeniz için özel olarak tasarlandı.
* Tanışmış Mıydık?- Yeni tanıştığınız bir flört, aranızın soğuk olduğu bir aile bireyi, taze başlamış bir dostluk ve benzeri bağlantılarınızda yüreğinize dokunacak soruların cevaplarını öğreneceksiniz.
* Erkek Erkeğe- En sağlam dostlarınızla krallar gibi eğleneceğeniz vakitler geçirin.
* Yaramaz- Bu oyun, birbirinizin bedenlerini keşfedebilmeniz için özenle tasarlandı.

Name: Toa Maji
Description:
Toa Maji qui signifie “offrir de l’eau” en swahili, est un concept d’application mobile révolutionnaire qui à vocation à créer de la valeur afin de financer l’accès à l’eau potable pour les populations défavorisées dans les pays moins avancés.

Le concept s'inspire des modèles économiques des grandes entreprises du marketing digital, de l’E-commerce et des jeux mais s'en distingue en reversant continuellement un cashback à la communauté Toa Maji par le biais de la loterie ainsi qu’un tiers des bénéfices de l’entreprise pour apporter une solution au problème de l’eau.

Toa Maji est un concept mondial unique ! Dans les pays moins avancés, il aide les populations défavorisées qui peuvent bénéficier d'un accès gratuit à l'eau potable. Tandis que dans les pays développés il soutient le pouvoir d'achat de sa communauté dans un contexte d’inflation galopante.

En ce sens, le concept Toa Maji est une innovation de rupture qui permet d'apporter des solutions concrètes à des problématiques globales et suggère un formidable changement de paradigme puisqu'il réconcilie libéralisme et solidarité internationale.

Without wanting to be cliché, this is a game-changer in every sense of the phrase. We set out to push the boundaries on how scalable and sustainable gameplay systems execute in DeFi. Behind the game, we have built a robust ecosystem that exploits the overlap between gaming communities and cryptocurrency investors by focusing on solving issues that have plagued the GameFi industry, particularly in P2E – inflation, security, stability, scalability, and sustainability – all of them have been project-killers. Name: MLTV LLC
Description:
MLTV, 2024 yılında Onur “RECKLAI” BUHURCU tarafından kuruldu. Mobile Legends Bang Bang maçlarının kayıtlarına ev sahipliği yapmak için oluşturuldu, ancak Mobile Legends Bang Bang haberlerini içerecek şekilde büyüdü. MLTV, 2025 yılında piyasaya sürüldüklerinde Mobile Legends Bang Bang için MLTV demolarını depolamaya başladı. O zamandan beri Mobile Legends Bang Bang’ın profesyonel e-spor sahnesi için haberleri, istatistikleri ve analizleri içerecek şekilde gelişti.

2025’in ilk aylarında HMLTV, takımları kendi derecelendirme sistemlerine göre sıralama kararı aldı.MLTV, her turnuvada en yüksek performans gösteren oyuncuya En Değerli Oyuncu (MVP) madalyalarını verecek şekilde kendi sistemini kurdu. Ayrıca ortalamanın üzerinde performans sergileyen oyunculara Olağanüstü Değerli Oyuncu (EVP) madalyaları verecek şekilde planladı. Profesyonel eşleşme sonuçları gibi veriler, yardımcı web sitelerinden MLTV’ye beslenir. 2025’den itibaren Mobile Legends Bang Bang’ın ilk sürümüyle MLTV, tüm profesyonel Mobile Legends Bang Bang oyuncularını o yılki performanslarına göre sıralama kararı aldı. Bunun sonucunda, artık MLTV’den gelen verilerle oyuncuların takım bulma ve takımların oyuncu bulma konularında Türkiye’de lider konuma geldi.

MLTV; oyuncu röportajları, turnuva ve ligler, Mobile Legends Bang Bang haberleri ile birlikte daha bir çok sistemi kendi bünyesinde barındırarak hem Mobile Legends Bang Bang Türkiye platformunu hem de takım ve oyuncuların gelişimleri adına ciddi yatırımlar yapmaya başladı.

Description:
At Mathemystic Innovations, we believe the human mind is the world’s greatest untapped resource. Yet, today’s education systems focus heavily on rote learning and exam performance, leaving behind the very skills that matter most: observation, reasoning, creativity, and decision-making.
We exist to change that.
Our mission is to build engaging platforms that act as Mental Gyms — spaces where children and professionals alike can exercise their cognitive muscles just as they would their physical ones. Through puzzles, storytelling, games, and adaptive challenges, we nurture curiosity, critical thinking, and problem-solving in ways that are joyful, measurable, and lasting.
Our Ecosystem
Plubo → A cognitive fitness platform for children (ages 4–18), blending physical kits + digital storytelling to make learning playful and permanent.
Synaptix → A corporate “Mental Gym” for professionals, designed to sharpen decision-making, adaptability, and resilience in the workplace.
Our Edge
Unlike EdTech platforms that deliver content, we focus on thinking fitness. Our learners don’t just watch or memorize — they struggle, iterate, discover, and grow stronger.

Name: VEXR
Description:
VEXR is a groundbreaking first of its kind, virtual reality (VR) mobile game designed to transform rehabilitation of orthopedic and athletic injuries. Patients can get back on the field or court virtually, challenge themselves, and stay motivated to actively participate in their own recovery. Patients can engage in complex movements and cognitive tasks simultaneously, helping them regain motor control, balance, and cognitive functions more efficiently. VEXR goes beyond traditional rehabilitation exercises by making it easier for clinicians to incorporate dual-tasking challenges. While featuring integrated patient outcome forms, allowing clinicians to better monitor their patients' progress.

The mission of VEXR is to reimagine the rehabilitation of orthopedic and athletic injuries by harnessing the power of virtual reality. Through immersive VR gameplay, we strive to facilitate a virtual path to patients’ and clinicians’ real world success.

Name: TEAM42
Description:
TEAM42는 “누구나 즐기는 마피아 게임을 모바일 게임으로도 만들어 보자” 라는 생각으로 처음 뭉쳐 어엿한 중소 게임사로까지 성장한 팀입니다. 처음 마피아42를 출시한 이후로 5년간 끊임없는 발전을 통해 가입자 1000만 명을 달성하였으며, 매년 2배 이상의 매출 성장을 기록하며 투자를 전혀 받지 않고도 안정적으로 성장하고 있습니다.

팀의 첫번째 프로젝트인 마피아42는 출시 이후 8년간 온라인 마피아게임 1위의 자리를 지키고 있으며, 특히 10대에게 인기가 많아 우리나라 청소년의 대부분은 마피아42를 플레이해본 경험이 있을 것 입니다. 현존하는 모바일게임 중 가장 저간 상호작용이 활발한 마피아42에는 독특한 고 특징들을 통해 단순한 게임을 넘어 현실과는 다른 하나의 사회가 만들어지고 있습니다.

저희의 목표는 마피아42를 통해 마피아 게임의 재미를 더욱 많은 저들이 느낄 수 있게 하는 것입니다. 이를 위해 지속적으로 색다른 컨텐츠를 만들어 업데이트를 진행하고 있으며, 최근에는 미국 시장까지 진출하여 의미 있는 성과를 만들어가고 있습니다. 또한 마피아42 이외에도 저희만의 특징을 담은 독특한 게임을 추가적으로 만들어서 새로운 도전을 준비하고 있습니다.

Name: Mini Militia Mod APK
Description:
Mini Militia Mod APK is a modified version of the popular mobile game "Mini Militia: Doodle Army 2." This modded version offers players a variety of enhancements and features not available in the original game, providing an enhanced gaming experience.

One of the primary attractions of the Mini Militia Mod APK is the availability of unlimited resources such as unlimited health, ammo, nitro, and bombs. This allows players to engage in battles without worrying about running out of essential supplies, giving them a significant advantage over opponents.

Additionally, the modded version often includes unlocked features and characters that are typically only accessible through in-app purchases or by completing specific challenges in the original game. This means players can enjoy all the content the game has to offer without having to spend real money or invest extensive time in unlocking items.

Moreover, Mini Militia Mod APKs frequently incorporate advanced customization options, allowing players to personalize their gaming experience further. This can include options to modify character appearances, weapons, maps, and gameplay mechanics, enabling players to tailor the game to their preferences.

Another notable aspect of Mini Militia Mod APKs is the inclusion of enhanced graphics and visual effects. By leveraging the capabilities of modern smartphones, modders can improve the game's visuals, making it more immersive and enjoyable for players.

Furthermore, some modded versions may feature additional game modes, maps, or challenges not found in the original game, adding variety and excitement to the gameplay experience. These customizations can breathe new life into the game for seasoned players who may have exhausted the content of the original version.

However, it's essential to note that downloading and using modded APKs may come with risks. Since these versions are not officially endorsed by the game developers, they may contain malware or other malicious software

Description:
تمرة هي شركة ناشئة تأسست في عام 2023 ومتخصصة في تطوير الألعاب لأجهزة الموبايل والأجهزة اللوحية. تهدف الشركة إلى تقديم تجارب ترفيهية ممتعة ومبتكرة لمستخدمي الأجهزة المحمولة عبر تطوير ألعاب متنوعة تناسب مختلف الفئات العمرية والاهتمامات.

فريق تمرة يتألف من مجموعة من المطورين والمصممين الموهوبين الذين يمتلكون خبرة واهتمامًا بصناعة الألعاب. يعمل هؤلاء المحترفون على تصميم ألعاب مبتكرة تستفيد من إمكانيات الأجهزة المحمولة واللوحية بأفضل طريقة ممكن. يمكن أن تشمل منتجات تمرة مجموعة متنوعة من الأنواع مثل الألعاب الأكشن، ألعاب المغامرات، الألعاب الألغاز، والألعاب الاجتماعية.

تمرة تسعى إلى تحقيق التميز في عالم تطوير الألعاب الموبايل والأجهزة اللوحية من خلال تقديم تجارب لعب رائعة تجمع بين الجرافيكس الجذاب والأسلوب اللعبي الإبداعي. يتميز فريق الشركة بالقدرة على متابعة أحدث اتجاهات السوق وتقديم ألعاب تلبي توقعات الجمهور المتنوع. بفضل تركيزها على أجهزة الموبايل والأجهزة اللوحية، يمكن أن تكون تمرة على استعداد دائم لاستغلال نمو سوق الألعاب المحمولة بفعالية ونجاح.

Name: Goons Entertainment Inc.
Description:
A gaming universe that incorporates risk-to-earn mechanics into its games. 

Our flagship gaming product is an NFT-based trading card game called Goon Wars that is currently in open beta on desktop web browsers and native mobile apps. It is free-to-play for all, where players collect card NFTs to create competitive playable decks and battle each other to earn rewards.

VISION
GOB aims to combine the best of traditional gaming with the benefits of web3 technology.

PRINCIPLES
Following the first principles of game development, we focus on core gameplay mechanics that are fun, rewarding, engaging, and meaningful. Any web3 or decentralization components are abstracted away from players, making the game highly attractive to traditional and crypto players, alike. 

We replaced the play-to-earn (P2E) model with risk-to-earn (R2E), which is rooted in the economic principle that for a reward to exist, some risk must be involved. Players can engage in a zero-sum game where there are both losers and winners - a sustainable economy.

Name: Chess Art for Kids: Kindergarten to Grandmaster
Description:
Learn chess by playing. Especially designed for kids. Many playing modes.

Description
An interactive offline chess game with different playing modes and levels.

It is an educational chess game especially designed for kids to help them learn chess by playing in a sequential way and of course to have fun.

Currently the app doesn’t contain chess lessons or instructions regarding chess theory.

We believe the way to learn chess by playing is at least equally important as chess theory and this app could be an additional tool and also could be the main tool when the kid is not going to courses and lessons or learn in chess any different way.


When the piece is selected, the possible moves are colored in green on the board, and a red color marks all tries to move where it is not allowed in the current game mode.

Having this in mind the kids could learn by playing, needing only a little help in the beginning mainly with the buttons and menu, not with the board and pieces themself.

The game could be played by 2 players on the same device, so the opponent could be your friend who is physically with you.

Also you could play as 1 player and then your opponent will be the open source chess engine Bagatur. When Bagatur plays, it has an increasing strength level, starting from level 1.

In general, chess is one of the games that challenge your brain.

Playing chess is fun, but also it is helpful, because it develops and increases several mind capabilities like Analytical skills, Memory, Strategic thinking, Concentration level, IQ, Patterns recognition and many others.

Que vous soyez de passage ou local : plongez vous dans un univers narratif unique, mêlant faits historiques et fiction afin de reconnecter passé et moment présent. Name: Math for Kids: 1st to 4th Class Graders
Description:
Tests of Arithmetic, Visuals, Numbers Series.

Description
The purpose of this app is to help kids learn math.

To make learning more interesting, it is represented as a game and offers math tests with questions and answers.

The levels are from kindergarten, preschool, class 1, class 2, class 3 to class 4 and even more, depending on the mathematics education system, which is used in the school.

It is appropriate for:
- Kindergarten ages, when the kids learn counting and shapes.

- In school ages for preparation in mathematics into the area of common core math.

The questions cover different areas: Visual counting – animals, objects, shapes; Arithmetic – addition, subtraction, multiplication, division; Equations and Inequalities; Finding patterns in Numbers series.

It has different levels where the numbers go up from 10 to 20, 50, 100, 1000.

Playing instructions
- First you need to select a level from the menu. By default it starts in Kindergarten mode (counting).

- When a game starts the first question appears and you have to click one of the four buttons with answers.

- So, the first goal is to have as many as possible correct answers at the end of the test sequence.

- When you start achieving all correct answers of the level easily, it is time to speed up your reactions/calculations and make them in a shorter time. The app is keeping your best result for each level and shows it.

Except high math grades in school, math tests develop and increase several mind capabilities, like Speed of counting and calculations, patterns recognition, concentration level, IQ, analytical skills, systematic thinking and logic, abstract thinking and many others.

Name: Move4Fun
Description:
The MOVE4FUN project’s general objective is to enhance physical activity among adolescents across Europe via innovative, evidence-based content offered in form of a mobile application. According to WHO, 81% of adolescents aged 11-17 are not sufficiently active. The decline in levels of physical activity is progressing fast and despite many efforts by national agencies, there is no success in reversing that trend. Recently, a new WHO guidance has been published which entailed that any engagement in physical activity is better than none. This is an important change as it shifts focus from highly structured interventions to programs for exercising and gives an opportunity to offer more engaging and more autonomous support to enhance physical activity.
Project MOVE4FUN employs that approach offering a bridging between evidence-based content and fun, game-based programs offered in a mobile application.

Mobile applications have been recently shown to be supportive of engaging in physical activity among adolescents while game-based content was associated with higher levels of physical activity. Social inclusion is also an important goal for the current project as it gives an opportunity for reaching out to a larger population whether it is due to localisation and lack of adequate infrastructure or unusual epidemic restrictions. Hence an international approach with the cooperation of world-class experts with experienced researchers is a promising consortium set up to achieve projects’ goals.

The project is designed to achieve three goals with a logical, evidence-based approach. Firstly, the literature review will be carried out to establish the baseline picture for the current state of physical activity among adolescents. Secondly, research will be carried out to fill the gaps and to establish the physical activity levels among adolescents in participating countries. Our project promotes the increase of capacity and professionalism when working at EU/international level.

We specialize in designing and developing mobile games with strong gameplay mechanics, smooth user interaction, and visually appealing designs. Our goal is to learn, innovate, and deliver high-quality games that entertain players while continuously improving our development skills.
At The Solanki Visions Studio, we believe great games are built through creativity, consistency, and passion for technology.

Why this studio exists
     The Solanki Visions Studio exists to turn focused creativity into real, playable experiences. It was founded with the belief that small teams, when disciplined and vision-driven, can build meaningful games without copying trends or relying on hype. The studio is built to learn, execute, and grow through real production—not shortcuts.

What problem it solves
     Many indie studios struggle with three core problems: lack of structure, inconsistent quality, and unfinished projects. The Solanki Visions Studio solves this by operating with clear processes, ownership, and accountability from day one. Every project follows defined standards, documented workflows, and a completion-first mindset, reducing chaos and increasing delivery reliability.

What makes it different from thousands of indie studios
     Unlike most indie studios that start as informal groups, The Solanki Visions Studio is structured like a real company from the beginning—clear leadership, legal ownership, documented policies, and professional discipline. It prioritizes long-term credibility over short-term visibility, quality over quantity, and execution over promises. The studio is built not just to make games, but to build a sustainable creative engine.

Name: LowIQ Studio's
Description:
Welcome to CashIQ, a daily quiz app designed to test your knowledge and offer you a chance to win cash prizes every day. Our app is designed for everyone, from trivia enthusiasts to beginners who want to learn something new. Here's a little bit more about who we are and what we do:

Our Mission
At CashIQ, our mission is to offer a fun and engaging way to test your knowledge and win cash prizes. We believe that everyone should have the chance to play, no matter their skill level, and we've designed our app to be accessible to everyone.

Randomized Questions for Fair Play
One of the unique features of CashIQ is that we generate 10 random questions for each player, and no two players receive the same questions. This ensures that everyone has an equal chance of winning and eliminates any possibility of cheating. So, whether you're a trivia master or a beginner, you'll have an equal chance to win.

Timed Quiz to Test Your Speed and Accuracy:
CashIQ is not just about answering questions correctly but also about speed. The app times each player in the quiz, and the player with the fastest time and the most correct answers wins. This adds an element of competition and excitement to the game, and it also tests your ability to think quickly and accurately.

Fresh Questions Generated Daily
To keep things interesting, we generate new questions every day. This ensures that our players are constantly challenged and never bored. We cover a wide range of topics, from history to science, and our questions range from easy to challenging. So, whether you're a history buff or a math whiz, there's something for everyone.

Competitive Cash Prizes:
We believe in offering competitive cash prizes that are worth playing for. Our prizes typically make up 50% of the revenue made from the advertisement. The more players that join the quiz, the higher the prize pool, so there's always an incentive to play and win.

Name: Venture Valley Game
Description:
The award-winning Venture Valley video game is a free PC and mobile (iOS and Android) multiplayer business-simulation where players take on the highs and lows of being an entrepreneur. Rated E from the ESRB, Venture Valley allows anyone to learn what it takes to build an empire from scratch as they pit strategy and business savvy against friends and competitors. Starting simple with a dog walking business, entrepreneurs learn how to grow and expand their empires by learning such principles as investments and dividends, fixed and variable expenses, loans, net vs. gross income, and more. Expansion businesses include a mini-golf course, pizza parlor, drone delivery service, robot factory, and many more.

Venture Valley has been recognized for several awards including: 
- 'Best of 2023 for Secondary Education' by Tech & Learning Magazine: The accolade recognizes Venture Valley for its exceptional contribution to educational technology, supporting teachers and students with entrepreneurship and business acumen throughout 2023.
- Serious Play ‘Gold’ Award for K-12 Education: Venture Valley has been honored with the ‘Gold’ Award in the K-12 Education category by the Serious Play Awards. This recognition highlights the game’s exceptional educational value, its ability to captivate and inspire students, and its impact on K-12 learning.
- Tech & Learning Award for ‘Best Back-to-School Secondary’: Venture Valley has been named the ‘Best Back-to-School Secondary’ solution by Tech & Learning Awards. This prestigious accolade emphasizes Venture Valley’s effectiveness as a secondary education tool, particularly in preparing students for their academic journeys.
- Second place in the 11th International Educational Games Competition at the 17th European Conference on Games Based Learning (ECGBL23)

Venture Valley is a product of the Singleton Foundation for Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship. A 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

Conçu par une psychiatre, GIFTED est une aventure éducative qui transforme le temps des injonctions, en moments de transmission 

Grâce aux parcours d'autonomie , votre enfant devient autonome dans ses tâches quotidiennes (Hygiène, Rangement, Respect, Devoirs) en 5 min de FUN par jour. 

Chaque tâche accomplie lui rapporte 1 GIFT POINT (GP). A partir de 25 GP, il peut choisir un "moment de partage" : une activité partagée avec la  personne de son choix, SANS ECRANS, où l'on construit des liens humains de qualité avec ses proches, en jouant ensemble... 

 Qu'est-ce qui "marche" dans GIFTED? 
- l'univers graphique enchanteur, qui résonne avec l'imaginaire de l'enfant
- les récompenses sous forme de "moments de partage"

 Car des liens de qualité, ce sont les cadeaux les plus précieux qu'on peut faire à un enfant: c'est la source dans laquelle il viendra puiser ses ressources tout au long de sa vie...


  En ce mois de décembre, nous lançons les préventes de l’application GIFTED, à partir de 10 euros par AN : un prix dérisoire, accessible à toute personne qui veut accorder de la valeur au LIEN.

 Le LIEN, ça n’a pas de prix… mais un tout petit peu quand même 
(Lorsqu’une appli est totalement gratuite, c’est parce que c’est VOUS qu’on achète  !!)

Description:
Have you ever tried to establish a home workout routine and stopped after a short time? 

No wonder. It's just not enough fun. 
 No adrenaline rush like climbing
 no competitive stimulus like ball sports. 
Home workouts are mostly a means to an end. 

It doesn't have to be that way. 

What if home workouts were as much fun as a video game? 
What if you got daily rewards for working out? 

All that is possible. With XGAINS.

We make Home Workouts a fun multiplayer game and reward your activity with real life rewards. And this is how it works 

1 Register in our app to get your XGAINS avatar. You can fully use the app for free. Upgrade to premium for special benefits.

2 Do different fitness exercises (push-ups, sit-ups, squats etc)
and record them with your phone camera. Our AI tracks your movements in real time & counts how many repetitions you can do.

3 Workout alone or compete against strangers 
in fun player-vs-player matches or tournaments.

4 Earn XGAINS coins
You earn coins with each completed exercise. The amount depends on your workout performance and your avatar's stats.

Earnings = Reps x Avatar Stats

5 Spend your earned coins the way you want to!
- Use your coins to improve your avatar 
- exchange your coins into reallife rewards like physical or digital goods in our shop
- donate your coins to charity

Name: WEDGE Golf Day Betting App
