Introducing WEDGE, the new way to manage your golf day betting.

Features:
- Create your own unlimited number of leagues / tournaments / golf days to bet on
- Invite an unlimited number of players

- Winners, and winnings, announced in the app by the event administrator
- Available on both android and ios devices, so you can all play together

They had created Gamestorme as an outlet to express their creativity and love for game design and development. Being avid Counter-Strike players, they were all too familiar with the pain of transferring in-game skins for real world value. From getting scammed to having to use shady third party websites, the world outside the in-game economy was the wild west with no protection for gamers. Thus, when they saw how NFT's could allow in-game assets to be truly owned by players and traded anywhere on the blockchain for real-world currency, they knew that blockchain gaming was the answer to their problems.

We at Gamestorme see our role in the blockchain gaming space as not only one that needs to continue to challenge the industry's standard for player monetization, ownership, and content creation, but also as the first blockchain gaming company in Puerto Rico; a role-model and trail-blazer for Puerto Rican blockchain gaming.

Name: TopCornerTrivia
Description:
TopCornerTrivia is a daily football quiz app built in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, designed to turn everyday football chat into a quick, competitive challenge between friends. What started as a simple idea, one tough question a day for real fans, has grown into a small but committed community of players who return daily to test their knowledge.

Each morning, players get 10 new football questions covering everything from Premier League classics to obscure European careers, Scottish football history, transfers, tournaments, and one-season wonders. It’s built for people who enjoy the tougher side of football trivia.

Despite being a one-person project built in spare time, the app has already passed 70+ daily active users, 130 accounts created, thousands of questions answered, and has secured its first local sponsor (Bailies Bar, Peterhead). Growth has been entirely organic through word of mouth and social media, no advertising budget, no agency spend.

The mission is simple:
Make football knowledge fun, social, and competitive, in less than 3 minutes a day.

TopCornerTrivia also aims to support the wider football community by exploring collaborations with clubs, creators, and local businesses. Current discussions include providing matchday programme trivia, women’s team content, and local sponsor packages that are affordable and deliver real visibility.

As the app grows, the long-term plan is to introduce new features such as weekly leaderboards, badges, & themed question sets.

If you’re a football fan, a business looking to collaborate, or someone interested in supporting a local Scottish startup, TopCornerTrivia would love to connect.

Name: Plantis - We help people have a healthy garden.
Description:
ABOUT

Plantis is designed to help house gardening hobbyists access all the knowledge, tools and support they need to care for their plants.
With its digital solution, PLANTIS aims to help establish more gardens and green areas across Poland.

THE SOLUTION

PLANTIS - Zielone Pogotowie is a mobile a platform for house gardening enthusiasts who need help with the daily care of their plants. It enables people to benefit from expert driven knowledge, useful tools and the support of a committed community.

The platform can help users identify plants and problems regarding them, and effectively plan their garden. It has features such as planning tutorials and articles from professional gardeners and experts, as well as guides and calendar for garden-based activities.

Through the engaging mobile app, Zielone Pogotowie aims to encourage more people to appreciate and enjoy horticulture as their hobby. 

HOW IT WORKS

Our mobile app gives access to general gardening advice, as well as expert knowledge and tips on how to plan and maintain a plant or garden. The platform offers a wide range of cultivation plans for various types of plants. 

The app also features a social feed, where users can interact with a community of horticulture hobbyists, enthusiasts and experts. It provides users with notifications regarding their plant condition as well as weather forecasts. 

PLANTIS - Zielone Pogotowie has in-app ads and features a bazar, where users can buy, sell and exchange plants, tools and other things related to gardening. 

The app can be downloaded from the Google Play and Apple Play Store. Users can sign up and access general tips for free. Other features will require a premium account subscription. The premium plan also gives access to all PLANTIS’s publications, calendars and guides in e-book format, and has features designed to help users better organise their messages and notifications.

Name: Tap Fantasy Game Studio
Description:
About us:
Our game team began developing HTML5 games in 2017. "TapTap Fantasy" — AKA: 紅の騎士團, 流火之詩, Knights of Fantasy, etc. — was officially released in 2019 in Taiwan, Japan, Southeast Asia, Thailand, South Korea, Russia, and other regions. “TapTap Fantasy” is the most popular adventure and role-playing game on Facebook and received two global features in less than six months.
 <TapTap Fantasy> accumulated more than 20 million users worldwide by the end of September 2021.

Our blockchain team has engaged in the development of blockchain projects since 2017. TVL of our DeFi project – Booster.farm, launched on HECO Chain in April 2021, exceeded US$2.5 billion in less than 24 hours.

Summary:
1. Free to Play:  <Tap Fantasy Metaverse> is a HTML5 MMOJRPG on the blockchain. No need to download the client and bind the wallet, just click the link to start the game.

Name: Lipi Game
Description:
Ancient Indian philosophers, scientists, mathematicians, doctors, poets, and thought leaders had written several scriptures, treatises, theories, epics, poems, and other stories in Indian languages. Written in complex yet technical languages like Sanskrit, they till date remain relevant to modern society as a treasure trove of ancient knowledge. With the advent of the AI era, we now have machines that can process, understand and comprehend these languages. However, due to the inherent complexity in digitizing Indian languages, the native content is not easily available on current digital and social media platforms.

Lipi.Game was founded to address the above challenge. It takes a gaming approach to encourage users to learn, preserve, and contribute to the rich knowledge and heritage expressed through ancient Indian languages, on mobile platforms.
The platform trains large native language data sets across its curated categories to make LLMs be as capable in native Indian languages as they are in English.

Lipi.Game is a fun and learning platform for all ages, encouraging the future generations to take a renewed interest in learning and mastering ancient languages, Indic culture and values.

Name: BOTTA
Description:
Botta est un jeu de société innovant qui réinvente le plaisir du football avec un concept hybride unique au monde.

Né d'une passion familiale et inspiré du célèbre jeu italien « Scopa », Botta mêle tradition et technologie pour proposer une expérience immersive unique, associant un jeu de cartes physique à une application mobile servant d’arbitre virtuel.

Chaque partie reproduit toutes les sensations d'un véritable match de football grâce à des fonctionnalités complètes : chronomètre, cartons jaunes et rouges, gestion des arrêts de jeu, prolongations, changements de joueurs, tirs au but, calcul automatique des scores, animations visuelles et sonores.

Avec des règles simples et accessibles à tous, Botta propose une dimension stratégique captivante, avec des milliers de combinaisons possibles pour chaque partie. Les cartes, conçues par un artiste spécialisé dans la gravure vintage, en font aussi un objet artistique et collector.

Notre engagement : proposer un produit éthique, local et écologique, avec une production Made in France (édition classique) et Made in Italy (édition Deluxe).

Botta, c’est plus qu’un jeu : c’est une communauté internationale qui partage l’amour du football, de la stratégie, et des moments précieux entre amis.

DefiDuel is a series of games allowing users to win crypto and NFT’s via daily free or wager contests, Weekly Free-Rolls, Stake the prize pool in Customizable Season-Long Leagues, Wager your own NFT’s against a contender in our 1vs1 “Play4Keeps” Game Mode!

What is NFT Matchups - We will take the top 50 NFT Projects and match them up in a weekly competition. Each user will attempt to predict the winner of each matchup based on a series of metrics such as volume, floor price, social media presence, and listings vs delistings. Correct predictions will award you points. Score more than your opponents to win the loot!

What is TraitWars - a fantasy game built around a single NFT collection! Attempt to pick the winning trait in a series of heads up trait matches! The sum of the score from each of your correct picks gives you your total score. If you’re feeling confident about your picks, create or register in a wager competition!! 1vs1 contests • 3-18 person contests • Season-Long Leagues. Currently working with the Lazy Lions to roll out our beta version.

Why Join Us- We can help to increase awareness and community engagement in your NFT Project? This new/exciting game mode in DefiDuels is currently being built to do just that! The TW mode will drive significant in-collection competiton for NFT Projects through a captivating new fantasy game! What are you waiting for? Join the growing number of projects who want to be listed in DefiDuels!

Name: Stroop Effect Test: Challenge and Test your Brain
Description:
The purpose of this app is to demonstrate and illustrate an interesting phenomenon, which appears into the brain/neurons, when a task for our brain challenges the links between the visual color incoming by eye nerves and the word of the color processed by the rational mind.

The Stroop test is actually challenging our brain and mind.

Background from neuroscience:
1. The eye nerves are delivering signals to the brain much faster than the rational mind, because the eye nerves respond immediately and the rational mind needs time to think.

2. When we have time pressure to answer correctly, this specifics of our brain and nerves are creating a impulse inside us, where we want to click on the incorrect answer and in the same time we need to use our will, stay focused and think fast consciously in order to have correct answers and make all questions each time for shorter period of time.

Playing instructions
- First you need to select one of two modes. By default it starts in Stroop Effect or “Get Meaning, Put Color” as named in the menu.

- When a game starts the first question appears and you have to click one of the four buttons with colors as an answer.

- So, the first goal is to have as many as possible correct answers at the end of the test sequence.

- When you start achieving all correct answers easily, it is time to speed up your reactions and make them for a shorter time.

Features
- Playing mode “Get Meaning, Put Color” or Stroop Effect – Understand the meaning and click the button colored with this color.

- Playing mode “Get Color, Put Meaning” – Recognize the colour and click the button with the correct written color as text.

- Questions organized as a test sequence.

- Shows the result after the test.

- High scores – keeps track of your best result for each level.

- Supports different color palettes for different tastes.

Name: Dashdice
Description:
DashDice is a skill-based mobile PvP strategy game built for fast, competitive play and long-term mastery.

The game is designed around short, high-stakes matches where players manage probability, timing, and ability choices rather than relying on reflexes or pay-to-win mechanics. Every decision matters. Outcomes are shaped by strategy, risk management, and player intent.

DashDice is being built mobile-first with global scalability in mind. The product prioritises clarity, fairness, and replayability foundations required for competitive ecosystems, LiveOps longevity, and future esports potential.

The company is currently in active development with a working prototype, international playtesting, and a senior team forming across engineering, marketing, and LiveOps. Development is focused on a disciplined MVP, clear retention loops, and ethical, cosmetic-only monetisation.

DashDice is preparing for a pre-seed round and opening early conversations with investors who have experience in gaming, consumer products, and globally scalable platforms. At the same time, the company is hiring senior, hands-on leaders who want real ownership in building a competitive product from the ground up.

DashDice is built by people who care deeply about systems, fairness, and competitive integrity and who believe the next generation of mobile PvP will be defined by skill, not spend.

Name: Starlined
Description:
Starlined is a video game developer and publisher of AAA play-to-earn (P2E) crypto-games. Starlined removes the ownership gap between gamer and game, giving its stakeholders the power to direct the metaverse through a decentralized, community-governed game development model. 

Starlined's games feature collectable NFT assets with in-game functionality that are playable across multiple games planned for the Starlined metaverse and other games in the larger DeFi metaverse. With blockchain technology, Starlined gives players complete ownership over their in-game assets. Every in-game item is part of a decentralised NFT collection minted and stored in the player's Starlined crypto wallet. By having actual custody of assets—versus them belonging to the game— all time and effort in-game are transferred to real-world value. 

Starlined has partnered with Polygon to put an immersive AAA gaming metaverse on the Polygon blockchain.

Description:
Yoniee to innowacyjna platforma edukacyjna, która wykorzystuje grywalizację, aby przekształcić sposób, w jaki uczniowie i pracownicy przyswajają wiedzę. Nasza misja polega na tworzeniu angażujących procesów edukacyjnych, które są równie atrakcyjne, jak popularne gry mobilne.

Dzięki współpracy z ekspertami z różnych dziedzin nauki, takich jak cyberbezpieczeństwo, finanse osobiste czy dojrzewanie psychoseksualne, oferujemy unikalne scenariusze edukacyjne, które pomagają lepiej zrozumieć świat wokół nas. Yoniee to nie tylko aplikacja mobilna, to narzędzie, które łączy naukę z zabawą i rywalizacją. Zbieranie punktów, rankingi, quizy i odznaki motywują uczniów i pracowników do aktywnego zdobywania wiedzy w sposób nowoczesny i interaktywny.

Nasza platforma jest idealnym rozwiązaniem dla placówek edukacyjnych, korporacji i instytucji, które szukają innowacyjnych sposobów na wzrost zaangażowania oraz przyswajania treści przez młodzież i dorosłych. Tworzymy edukacyjne przygody, które sprawiają, że nauka staje się pasjonującą podróżą.

 Nasze obszary działania:

Grywalizacja w edukacji
Współpraca z ekspertami
Nowoczesne narzędzia edukacyjne (w tym AR)
Cyberbezpieczeństwo, finanse osobiste, i inne tematy pozaprzedmiotowe
Dołącz do nas i zobacz, jak innowacyjne podejście Yoniee zmienia przyszłość edukacji!

Name: NeuroSpeechAI
Description:
NeuroSpeechAI revolutionizes therapy for brain injury, stroke, and dementia patients through a suite of seven innovative apps. Incorporated in April 2023 as a UCL spinout by Professors Alex Leff, Jenny Crinion, and William Latham, we merge advanced mobile game development with a groundbreaking, tailored speech recognition system. 

Our apps are designed to understand and support distorted speech, enabling patients to use them independently for home-based therapy, while providing immediate, robust feedback on their progress.

Our technology not only offers personalized therapeutic exercises but also employs algorithmic AI to continuously enhance the platform based on user performance data. This approach ensures that each patient's experience is engaging, effective, and directly contributes to the improvement of their recovery.


Available for both mobile and desktop, NeuroSpeechAI's mission is to make quality therapy accessible to everyone affected by acquired cognitive, visual, and language disorders. By offering our apps on a global scale, we aim to speed up recovery and significantly improve the quality of life for our users, all from the comfort of their home.

Dedicated to breaking down barriers in therapy access, NeuroSpeechAI is a testament to the power of combining medical research with digital innovation to create real-world solutions for those in need.

Eria was founded in early 2022—we are changing the way people think about GameFi, DeFi, communication, and internet infrastructure.

There are two main problems that we solve at Eria. First of all, regular players do not own their digital assets; they cannot resell or use it outside of the game. Second, there is no sustainable P&E games on mobile devices; most P2E models have failed in the current bear market.

Ultimately, we want to create an unforgettable world that bridges regular	players with the P&E gaming economy and decentralised blockchain solutions, and to create an accessible, fine-tuned game that can succeed commercially with a global audience.

Our vision is to become one of the leading and most inspiring game on mobile devices, and to lead the mass adoption process through our Learning before Acting system.

At replic8, we draw inspiration from major players in the entertainment industry. By combining the familiar format of online challenges with the real-time performance rating mechanics, we have created a revolutionary dancing experience.

Name: WALLgames Studio
Description:
We are mobile game development studio WALLgames, our first game project “Immense World”.

Little about the project:
Immense World is a mobile 2d platform game that aims to achieve something that is often only found in PC gaming, namely IMMERSION. 
After all, it's not a secret for anyone that it is difficult to immerse the user in atmosphere of what is happening even on a PC, but for mobile gaming this is an almost impossible task. 
But the Moldavian team of enthusiasts, WALLgames sets itself such a task, for which we resort to the following: the game will have many hours of game plot, the denouement of which will depend solely on the player's choices that will come during the game session, all this will be diluted with animated scenes, for in order to achieve complete immersion in our fictional world. Of course, here I only touched on the tip of the iceberg, but for the mobile gaming market, this will be a new and interesting product, which will definitely not go unnoticed.

Presently :
  1. Finished Tekwill Startup Academy courses, during which we were supervised by experienced mentors.
  2. Canvas.
  3. Prezentation.
  4. Roadmap
  5. Landing page which you can find at the link: https://wallgamesstudio.wixsite.com/wall .
  6. Instagram account: https://www.instagram.com/wallgames.studio/ .
  7. At this stage, the WALLgames team includes 3 students.
  8. We participated in the Moldova StartUp Summit.
  9. Development is at the concept stage, which can be viewed at the following link: 
      https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6NcBKNX4tZM.

Our mission is to bridge the widening gap between tradition and technology, helping families and friends rediscover authentic connection, whether they're across a city or continents apart.

Why Plarty
Today’s apps excel at capturing attention, but few build genuine belonging. Plarty leverages regional languages, familiar games, and a community-first approach to help users replace endless scrolling with meaningful, playful moments. We believe real engagement happens when technology strengthens relationships, not just habits.

Our Vision
We're building more than an app, we're building a movement to revive play, presence, and cultural identity in the modern age.

With rapid user adoption and a high retention rate, Plarty is poised for its next stage of growth.

We invite investors and partners who share our belief, the future of tech is human, and the next big opportunity is in bringing people together.

- FootyFoot is the only hybrid freemium and NFTs game which can attract millions of Clubs’ fans of all budget:
Fans are coaches of their favorite teams and can even earn money without spending a dime. 
- Footyfoot is not a fantasy football game but a real 11 footballers game. It is not a NFTs financial speculation but a NFTs used in game by fans actors/coaches (a market still growing).
- Footyfoot real freemium business model promise: build a huge and healthy community of all Clubs' fans and take care of growing this ecosystem. 
This approach will motivate both paying and un-paying users to be more engaged in the game. 
- A business model based on a strong believe in sharing value/wealth (Gamers, Clubs, Athletes, Ambassadors,...) to generate more and significant revenue for all stakeholders.

Name: The ForgeMind
Description:
Forgemind is an innovative and visionary technology company building solutions at the intersection of artificial intelligence, big data, and modern software technologies. Since its foundation, Forgemind has been driving the digital transformation of individual developers, public institutions, and private enterprises—helping them turn data into insights, automate processes, and power smarter decision-making.

By simplifying complex AI models and making them accessible, Forgemind delivers secure, scalable, and customizable products that run seamlessly across both cloud and on-premises infrastructures. With a strong commitment to ethical data use and user privacy, we prioritize sustainability and societal impact in every solution we design.

Our expertise spans a wide spectrum of AI and data-driven applications, including:
	•	Machine Learning & Deep Learning – from traditional algorithms to advanced computer vision and natural language processing.
	•	Large Language Models (LLMs) – developing reasoning agents, prompt-chaining pipelines, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems.
	•	Time Series & Forecasting – financial predictions, anomaly detection, and demand/consumption modeling.
	•	OCR & Information Extraction – scalable text recognition and document processing solutions.
	•	Enterprise-Grade MLOps – CI/CD workflows, ML lifecycle management (MLFlow, MinIO), container orchestration (Kubernetes, OpenShift), and cloud integrations (AWS, Azure).
	•	Application Development – delivering AI-powered solutions to end users through mobile (Flutter) and web (React, Svelte) applications, as well as REST APIs for developers.

At Forgemind, we combine deep technical expertise with interdisciplinary thinking and a user-centric design philosophy. More than just building technology, we create meaningful value—helping organizations harness AI responsibly, effectively, and at scale.

Name: Loook
Description:
LOOOK – turning lost travel time into branded discovery time

Every year billions of hours are spent in cars and up to 70% of that time is unengaged. Kids get bored, parents get distracted… but for brands and destinations it is also a missed opportunity.

LOOOK transforms that wasted time into meaningful discovery moments. With short GPS-triggered audio stories we blend location-based storytelling with branded content to create personalized experiences on the move.

What’s in it for you?
Holiday parks → Extend the customer journey, boost guest excitement and increase on-site spend.
Cities → Deliver cultural storytelling, distribute visitor flows and stimulate local tourism & spending.
Automotive → Enhance the in-car experience, build brand loyalty and unlock data-driven insights.
Events & theme parcs → Build pre-event anticipation, optimize arrival management and grow on-site revenue.

LOOOK is a location-based audio storytelling platform with more than 10,000 human-crafted stories live across Europe and coverage on major routes. We partner with Center Parcs, Van Gogh Homeland, TEAM Houston and Sarasota. With new pilots expanding into leisure, automotive and events.

Our hybrid B2B2C model enables tourism boards, hospitality groups, car brands and cities to extend the customer journey, build loyalty and generate insights. For travelers, LOOOK turns lost travel time into discovery time; by car, on foot or on the water.

We are on track to reach 20.000 users this year and scale our library to 250.000 stories globally. Our vision is to be the global storytelling layer for travel and mobility.

Every place has a story. LOOOK brings it to life.

Online Kapitalizm Oyununda Oyuncular Bir İş İmparatorluğu Kurarlar ve Yönetirler. Gerçek Hayattaki İş Olayları Oyuna Yansıtılarak Pazarlama, Üretim, Satın Alma Gibi Birçok Nitelik Oyuna Kazandırılmıştır.
İş Dünyasını Anlamak İsteyen Herkesin Mutlaka Oynaması Gereken Bu Oyun, Tamamen Serbest Piyasa Üzerine Kurulmuş Olup Tüm Alım Satım ve Kar Oranları Gerçek Oyuncular Tarafından Belirlenmektedir.
Seviye Atlayarak ve Para Kazanarak İmparatoru Olduğunuz Bu Dünyayı Daha Da Geliştirebilir Ayrıca Bahçeler, Çiftlikler, Fabrikalar ve Madenler Kurarak İşletmenizi Büyütebilirsiniz. Dilerseniz Dükkanınızda Satacağınız Ürünleri Kendi Fabrikanızda Üretebilir, Dilerseniz De Başka Fabrikalardan Ürünler Alıp Türkiye’nin Farklı İllerindeki Gerçek Oyunculara Satabilirsiniz.
İşletme Açarken Paraya İhtiyacınız Olacak Ancak Geliştirmek İçin Sertifikalara İhtiyacınız Olacak, Bunun İçin De Kurslara Katılmanız veya Referans Sistemi İle Oyuna Yeni Oyuncular Kazandırmanız Gerekecektir.
Kapitalizm Oyununda Açacağınız Tüm İşletmelerinizin Satış Yaptıkça Seviyesi İlerleyecek ve Sizlere Daha Fazla Puan ve Para Kazancı Sağlatacaktır.
Kazandığınız Paraları Bankaya Yatırarak İster Faiz Olarak İşletebilir İsterseniz De Dolar veya Euro Alarak Kazancınızı Arttırabilirsiniz. Artan Paranızı Yeni Yatırımlarda Değerlendirebilirsiniz.
Kapitalizm Oyununda Kazandığınız Paralar Sizin Oyundaki Sıranızı Belirliyor, Oyun Sıralaması Hem Türkiye Hem de İl İl Olmak Üzere Toplam Servetinize Göre Oluşturuluyor

Name: FabrikaDons
Description:
FabrikaDons, c’est simple : tu joues, ça donne.

On a créé une plateforme solidaire où chaque minute passée sur un mini-jeu en ligne génère un don pour une association — grâce aux revenus publicitaires.

 Pas besoin de carte bleue, pas besoin de s’inscrire : tu joues, les pubs financent, on reverse.
 Objectif : 100 000 € reversés à des assos d’ici 2028.

⸻

Comment ça marche ?
	•	Tu choisis un mini-jeu (Tetris, 2048, etc.)
	•	Tu joues quelques minutes
	•	Les revenus pub générés pendant ce temps sont reversés à une association partenaire
	•	À terme, tu pourras même choisir l’asso que tu veux soutenir, suivre ton impact, voter pour les prochaines…

⸻

Pourquoi on fait ça ?
Parce que des milliers d’euros “flottent” tous les jours dans le temps d’attention web.
On transforme ce temps en levier de don.
On appelle ça : l’impact par l’usage.

⸻

Ce qu’on construit
	•	Une plateforme ouverte aux studios et créateurs
	•	Des mécaniques éthiques (pubs choisies, pas d’exploitation)
	•	Des campagnes solidaires pour les entreprises engagées
	•	Une communauté qui peut suivre, voter, proposer des assos ou des jeux
	•	Et des outils pour prouver concrètement l’impact généré

⸻

Tu veux participer ?
	•	 Tu es joueur/joueuse ? Viens sur fabrikadons.fr
	•	 Tu es dev jeu vidéo ? Propose un jeu
	•	 Tu es une asso ? Suggère ton projet
	•	 Tu es une entreprise ? Finançons ensemble une campagne à impact

⸻

 Projet conçu dans le Trégor (22), propulsé par FabrikaImpact.fr

Description:
Have you ever wondered how much money app game companies make for the hours you spend playing their mobile games? 

How much of that money have you ever seen?

Now imagine a mobile game that makes you passive income for your time.

Introducing the Brayzin Project, which will entail the release of a free to play, match 3 puzzle game called, Brayzin Heist, whereby players will heist Brayzin tokens as a reward for completing milestone levels within the game. The deeper that players go into our game, the more tokens they will heist, thus incentivising players to complete as many milestone levels as possible. 

BRZN is the first token whose value is linked to the number of players in our game network (both android and IOS), however we have learnt through experience that the most popular app games in the word are simple to use –match 3 puzzle games (think Candy Crush), however no one has attempted to tokenize the rewards in these games and that is where we come in.

Our app will be monetised using a combination of serving ads during natural breaks in the game between levels and offering in- app purchases to players whereby 80% of all revenue generated will be added into the Brayzin liquidity pool and locked for 100 years.

Name: Cubilete Cup
Description:
Cubilete Cup is a modern revival of El Cubilete, a traditional Cuban dice game with deep roots in Latin American culture. Originating in Cuba during the early 20th century, the game became a favorite pastime in homes, bars, and social clubs, known for its blend of luck, strategy, and lively competition.

Over time, the game spread across the Caribbean and South America under different names—Perudo, Dudo, Pirates Dice, and Cubilete—each region adding its own twist to the rules and rituals. Despite variations, the spirit remained the same: a social contest of bluffing, probability, and bold moves shared among friends and families.

Cubilete Cup brings this cultural treasure to the digital age—complete with multiplayer gameplay, achievements, and regional tournaments—preserving the thrill of the original while connecting players worldwide.

Created with authenticity and love.

Name: Bet on Combat
Description:
Bet on Combat is a pioneer in sports investing and the utmost authority in the combat sports betting industry. Founded in 2000 by French Canadian martial artist and entrepreneur Franco Richard, Bet on Combat LLC is a global company that offers a full range of consulting, investing and gaming services, including their BOC Consulting, BOC Fund, and BOC Gaming. Headquartered in the Caribbean nation of Antigua, Bet on Combat was first established in Taiwan as an online odds comparison service then evolved into a combat sports betting consulting firm, where members are advised concerning who to bet on and how to bet them, similar to your stock broker advising you on which stock or fund to invest your money in. 

Exploding onto the sports investing scene in 2010, Bet on Combat now bring's you the opportunity to invest on the burgeoning market of combat sports via its multi-sports hedge fund BOC Fund from anywhere at anytime in real time at your fingertips. Despite their relatively young age, BOC Fund has quickly established itself as one of the world’s fastest growing destinations for income investing, thus making it the number one ranked sports hedge fund company in terms of size and revenue in 2017, with approximately $2.8 million in assets and a return on investment over +196.23% to investors. This is why BOC Fund is trusted to manage more money than any other sports investment firm in the world. 

From small-time bettors to big-time whales who put six figures on the line, whether you’re speculating in alternative investments or serious about a long term investment opportunity, Bet on Combat is your leading global destinations for the latest odds, lines movement and on all things related to the numbers around combat sports wagering.

Name: GAMEROW
Description:
Game development is unique, a delicate balance of artistry and engineering, of creative exploration and disciplined execution. So why do we measure this extraordinary process with ordinary tools? The progress of a great game isn't measured in completed tickets; it's measured in its CRAFT.

At GAMEROW, we believe it's time for a new paradigm in development intelligence. We created the CRAFT framework—a new language for understanding project health based on five essential pillars:

Creative Output: The consistency of creative exploration.
Resonance: The integration of feedback from real play.
Alignment: The harmony of cross-role coordination.
Flow: The continuity of your development pipeline.
Technique: The quality and stability of your build.

GAMEROW is the AI-driven platform that brings this philosophy to life. Our sophisticated co-pilot connects to your existing development ecosystem, unifying disparate data streams to provide a holistic, human-centric view of your project's journey. It surfaces unbiased insights, visualizes the conceptual connections within your work, and offers predictive analysis to guide your path forward.

By embracing the CRAFT framework, studios transform their process. Teams become more aligned, creativity is backed by data, and leaders are empowered to make confident decisions that protect both the project's vision and the team's well-being. Gamerow provides the clarity to innovate boldly and the foresight to navigate complexity with ease.

Join the movement of studios building better games, more intelligently.
Learn more about the CRAFT framework and the Gamerow platform on our website. https://gamerow.in

Po úspešnom prejdení hry, zákazník získa odmenu podľa požiadaviek klienta (napríklad zľavový kód, výherný produkt / služba, zapojenie do súťaže alebo iný špeciálny obsah) .
Navyše hra môže obsahovať preklik do internetového obchodu, či dedikovanú informačnú sekciu (katalóg, najnovšia ponuka, akcie, menu...).

Description:
At Connect Corner, we understand the unique challenges that remote work presents to team cohesion and spirit. Our innovative app is expertly designed to bridge the physical gap, transforming remote work dynamics by fostering a connected and vibrant team environment.

Here's how Connect Corner can revolutionize team interactions:

 Daily Question Rituals: Kickstart the day with engaging questions that serve as perfect icebreakers, encouraging team members to share and engage in a way that fuels camaraderie and opens up meaningful dialogue.

 Dynamic Group Chats: Our app allows for the creation of multiple chat groups, mirroring the spontaneous and essential "water cooler" conversations that build relationships in a physical office setting.

 Sharing Personal Stories: We encourage teams to share personal insights in relation to daily topics, deepening the team bond through shared experiences and understanding.

 Themed Discussion Weeks: Connect Corner promotes themed weeks with daily questions focused on varied subjects like innovation or cultural diversity, fostering a culture of continuous learning and inclusivity.

 Peer Learning and Growth: Our platform is a space for sharing knowledge, seeking advice, and discussing professional development, contributing to the overall growth of the team.

Connect Corner isn't merely an app—it's a community builder, a conversation starter, and a catalyst for team unity. Designed for the modern workforce, it's your partner in creating a stronger, more cohesive remote team.

Join us and be a part of the future of work, where distance is no barrier to team spirit and collective success.

Download Connect Corner today and step into a world of enhanced team dynamics.

Name: Landover
Description:
Many people will instantly recognize Landover as being very similar to Settlers of Catan. It is true that Landover shares many similarities and was inspired by Settlers of Catan and its expansion packs, Cities & Knights and Seafarers. I was very much a Catan enthusiast and played on many of the online sites including Asobrain and playcatan.

After having tried Catan Universe, I realized that there were no longer any good places left to play Catan online, as asobrain’s technology was now defunct on modern browsers, and the Catan Universe UI was cumbersome and the game was riddled with bugs.

In addition to not having any good online destinations for Settlers of Catan, I also realized that Catan needed some massive rule changes to improve the speed of the game, simplify the mechanics, and make the game easier to learn. Much like Hearthstone did for Magic the Gathering. Landover greatly improves Catan through simpler mechanics and less complexity while still staying true to the overall concept.

 Build a better sleep routine.

BoomeranGO! is educational, but unlike many other apps or games, it encourages kids to learn in a very natural way. It's not something that kids are asked to do, like homework, for example. BoomeranGO! is part of their fun time as a game first.

 Our team is on a mission to help kids build healthy habits on their terms. 

 Our vision is for every child to lead a healthy life.

“It truly takes a village. So we follow the latest expertise of the top behavioral scientists and pediatric nutritionists. Together with our world-class game developers, we use it to continuously develop BoomeranGO! healthy habit-building system” says Mantas Kondratavicius, founder and CEO of BoomeranGO.

For the vision to be realized, we believe in embracing this increasingly technological nature of childhood. 

Kids get technology savvy at a very young age now. According to 2021 research in the US, kids aged 8–12 spend about 1.5h on social media and 2.5h playing video games daily. And that’s part of their average 7.5h of daily screen time.

So reaching them in their preferred way of spending free time – on their smartphones – is crucial when helping them build healthy habits. Especially since research suggests that kids have their habits formed by the age of 9.

Let’s help the kids to grow up into healthy and thriving adults.

 It’s GO! time

TamTu to aplikacja do gier miejskich służąca jako doskonałe narzędzie do budowania relacji w zespołach hybrydowych, a poprzez realizację

Zadania dopasujemy do grupy docelowej, ale sama gra jest dla wszystkich! - pracowników firmy, klientów, ale także uczniów szkół, młodzieży, seniorów czy całych rodzin.

Revolutionizing Outdoor Entertainment

Introduction

In an era where digital and real-world experiences are increasingly blending, outer.
games emerges as a trailblazer, redefining the concept of gaming and outdoor adventure. Founded by Daniel Karsh, a distinguished iOS developer with over 15 years of experience, outer.games stands at the intersection of technology, storytelling, and the great outdoors. The Vision Behind outer.games:

Daniel Karsh, the brain behind outer.games, brings a wealth of experience from his extensive career in iOS development, having led teams at prestigious companies like Bank of America and Display/Infinite Reality. His expertise in creating sophisticated applications with rich user interfaces and optimized performance is the cornerstone of outer.games' innovative approach.

Outer Games is not just a gaming company; it's a new genre of entertainment that invites players to step into a world where their physical surroundings become an integral part of the gaming experience. This vision is rooted in the belief that gaming should be a holistic experience – one that stimulates the mind, engages the body, and elevates the spirit.

The Outer Games Experience

Each game designed by Outer Games is an adventure, a narrative-driven journey that unfolds in the real world. The company develops unique boxes for each game, designed to be interactive and weather-proof. These boxes serve as physical touchpoints in the gaming experience, blending digital elements with the real world.

Players are immersed in a story, where they interact with both the physical boxes and digital elements through their mobile devices. This integration of technology allows for a seamless and captivating gaming experience that transcends traditional boundaries.

Name: Birdie Battle Club
Description:
Birdie Battle Club is the world's first global monthly golf competition platform where players of all skill levels compete for cash prizes by submitting video challenges.

Every month, members receive two challenges, one indoor and one outdoor, designed to test different aspects of their game. From pressure putting to wedge accuracy to creative trick shots, our challenges make practice competitive and fun. Submit your video, climb the live leaderboard, and compete against golfers worldwide.

How It Works:
Members submit video entries completing the monthly challenge. Our team reviews submissions, verifies scores, and updates the live leaderboard throughout the month. Top performers win cash prizes, while everyone gets the motivation to sharpen their skills.

Why Birdie Battle Club?
Golf is a global game, but most competitions are local, expensive, or require handicaps and course access. We're changing that. Whether you're hitting balls in a simulator, practicing on a mat in your garage, or playing your home course, you can compete. No tee times required. No travel necessary. Just you, the challenge, and golfers around the world pushing each other to improve.

Built for Community:
We believe golf grows when communities thrive. A portion of our revenue goes directly to golf nonprofits like First Tee and Youth on Course, organizations expanding access and developing the next generation of players.

For Partners:
We work with golf brands, simulator companies, fitness and recovery brands, and creators who share our vision. Our platform offers authentic engagement with a passionate, global golf community actively creating and sharing content.

Join the Club:
Whether you're a scratch golfer or just getting started, Birdie Battle Club gives you a reason to practice with purpose. New challenges drop every month. The leaderboard is live. The competition is global.

Ready to battle?

Name: ByteBeasts
Description:
ByteBeasts is an on-chain gaming ecosystem built on Starknet that allows players to train and eventually battle unique digital creatures across multiple interconnected experiences. The platform leverages Starknet zk-Rollup technology to deliver high-speed, low-cost transactions, ensuring verifiable ownership of digital assets. Implemented with Dojo Engine, Cairo for smart contracts, and React for the client, ByteBeasts incorporates decentralized mechanics that enable players to participate in an expandable universe, generating value through a truly player-owned game economy.

We are currently developing ByteBeasts Tamagotchi, the first game in the on-chain ByteBeasts universe, where players nurture and care for their Beasts, guiding them through their journey to their first evolution.

Name: Operation Safe Place Defense
Description:
Operation Safe Place Tower Defense (OSPTD) is an innovative, hybrid gaming experience that merges the strategic depth of tower defense with the dynamic action of third-person shooting. Set within the diverse and conflict-ridden continent of Athera, OSPTD invites players to engage in epic battles where every decision counts.

At the heart of OSPTD is our mission to provide not just entertainment, but also to create a lasting social impact. We are committed to supporting initiatives like the "Every Child Safe" campaign, which aims to protect vulnerable children worldwide. A portion of our revenue is dedicated to this cause, ensuring that our game contributes positively to society.

Our game is built on the cutting-edge blockchain technology, offering players true ownership of their in-game assets through Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs). Each card in OSPTD represents a unique or limited-edition NFT, ranging from common to ultra-exotic rarities. Players can collect, trade, and upgrade these cards, which retain their value and utility across all game modes and future titles within our ecosystem. This creates a vibrant marketplace where players’ investments in their decks can grow over time.

We are currently in the development phase, with a working demo of the 2D version and a demo of the 3D arena and multiplayer modes. Our roadmap includes exciting milestones, such as the launch of the first playable card pack, integration of cooperative modes, and full releases across multiple platforms, including iOS and Android.

Backed by a passionate team of developers, artists, and blockchain experts, OSPTD is set to redefine the gaming landscape by blending traditional gameplay with the latest in blockchain innovation.

Join us as we build not just a game, but a community committed to making the world a safer place, one epic battle at a time.

Name: ConverStory Technologies Inc.
Description:
"See what you say!"
While social media has brought us together from vast distances, ConverStory uses the latest advancements in speech recognition and image search technologies to bring it to a more intimate setting.

Launch the application on your Android phone or tablet. Start talking and VOILA! Your spoken words display in real-time across the bottom of the screen, and images start to appear like magic related to the topic you're speaking about.
It works great as a voice activated image search tool. Quickly and easily find an image using your voice, then save, set as wallpaper or share it to other apps.
It's also a useful tool for speech pathology (therapy) and those who are learning how to speak English. The real-time captions are very useful to the hard of hearing.

Chromecast ConverStory to big screen TVs and projectors!

ConverStory currently offers:

• speech activated streaming image slideshow experience
• real-time speech to text captions
• English speech to caption translation in over 50 languages
• works in both portrait and landscape orientations
• image pause and play controls
• voice activated image search
• save, share or set the image as wallpaper
• swipe right to browse back through image history
• settings section for customizable functionality
• Built-in slideshow with local time clock displays when no speech is detected
• Google Chromecast functionality

Experience a new dimension in social media!

Name: Fruwee
Description:
About Fruwee 

Welcome to Fruwee, a spirited and visionary mobile gaming studio where innovation meets love for our furry friends. 
As creators of the first of its kind game "Real Pets," we're set on delivering engaging, enjoyable, and inclusive experiences that bridge the gap between virtual play and heartfelt affection for pets. 
Our dedicated team of three is deeply committed to bringing high-caliber gameplay that fuels a community bonded by a shared adoration for animals.

Our pride, Real Pets, is a vibrant pet simulation mobile game, meticulously crafted to immerse users in a world where the delight and obligations of pet ownership are just a click away. 
What uniquely positions Real Pets is our extraordinary and diverse audience, significantly comprised of adult and female players — a demographic renowned for their enthusiasm about pets and receptiveness to pet-related merchandise.
Our game development philosophy and in-game advertising strategy stem from our staunch belief in organic user engagement. 

At Fruwee, we champion collaborative growth. We provide an unparalleled opportunity for pet brands to resonate with an active purchasing audience and simultaneously cultivate a pre-revenue audience. 

This symbiosis of engaging gameplay and strategic brand integration opens up dynamic marketing avenues for brands eyeing a strong rapport with a passionate and diverse audience of pet lovers.
Join us as we push the boundaries of mobile gaming while championing a cause close to our hearts. 

Let's revolutionize the way brands interact with their audience, contributing to a better world for our four-legged pals. 


At Fruwee, we eagerly anticipate collaborations that align with our mission and vision. 


Let's join hands in fostering a pet-loving community, one game at a time.

Name: Offside Club
Description:
Offside Club revoluciona la manera en que los fanáticos del fútbol interactúan con el juego y sus amigos. 

Cada jornada, Offside Club convierte la pasión futbolera en una experiencia interactiva y competitiva, donde cada predicción refuerza la rivalidad sana y mantiene la conversación siempre activa.

Antes de cada fecha, la plataforma envía preguntas en tiempo real sobre los partidos: quién ganará, cuántos goles habrá, quién marcará primero, entre otros. Los usuarios compiten con amigos tratando de predecir lo que sucederá, suman puntos con cada acierto y suben en el ranking. Al final de la temporada, la clasificación revelará quién fue el mejor predictor de la liga.

La interacción no se detiene cuando no hay partidos. Offside Club mantiene la conversación activa con preguntas sociales diseñadas para generar debates y entretenimiento en los grupos: quién sería el primero en pedir el cambio por estar agotado. Si fuéramos comentaristas deportivos, quién diría más datos completamente falsos con total seguridad. 

Una experiencia social y dinámica que transforma la pasión por el fútbol en un desafío emocionante.

 Predicciones en vivo  Competencia social  Ranking dinámico

 Próximamente en Android e iOS. Únete a la revolución futbolera!

Name: Craft Blast
Description:
The Inventor had given them wonderful thingS-machines for grinding corn, for weaving cloth, and countless others. The townspeople loved him. But he was getting old, and there was only time for only one more invention. 
So he decided that his last work would be a very special kind of machine. This one would not be for moving or heating or calculating. but for making happiness itself. The townspeople didn't understand, but they trusted him. He'd never let them down before. So the inventor retreated into his castle and worked. Years passed. 
At first, the townspeople waited patiently. Then they doubted. Then they became angry. "Where is it?" they asked. "It's taking too long." "It's costing too much." "He's tricking us." "We must destroy him." Just as the mob arrived at the castle, the gates opened and the Inventor came out. "It is accomplished!he declared. The mob quieted for a moment and he led them inside. 
But there was no great engine-only a roomful of tables littered with cards, booklets,and tiny pieces of wood. "Where is the machine?" asked the leader of the mob, readying his club. 
"Where is the machine of happiness?" "Itis here," said the Inventor, motioning to the dice, rulebooks, and game boards. "Have a seat, and let's play."

 Olympe est la première application pensée pour enregistrer discrètement une situation à risque.
Un simple bouton ou un mot déclencheur (exemple : “fraise bleue”) permet de lancer un enregistrement instantané.
L’audio et la localisation peuvent être transmis à un contact d’urgence, et tout est sauvegardé en sécurité sur le téléphone.

Notre mission est simple : offrir à chacun(e) un outil concret pour se protéger et agir.
 Parce qu’un mot ou un geste peut tout changer.

 Découvrez Olympe dès aujourd’hui.

Name: Y Europe Network
Description:
Y EUROPE NETWORK – Le réseau social européen qui place la liberté et la sécurité au cœur de l’expérience

Y est un réseau social d’origine européenne, créé en France, conçu pour offrir aux utilisateurs du monde entier une alternative aux plateformes dominées par les géants américains et chinois. Gratuit et accessible, Y met l’accent sur la liberté d’expression, le respect des valeurs humanistes et la promotion d’idées innovantes.

La plateforme lutte activement contre les contenus haineux, la désinformation et le harcèlement, tout en proposant un environnement adapté aux utilisateurs majeurs, favorisant la sécurité et la responsabilité numérique. Elle permet de suivre les acteurs de l’actualité, de partager vos idées, de rejoindre des groupes thématiques et d’interagir sans subir les effets d’algorithmes biaisés.

Y encourage également l’accès à des contenus utiles et bienveillants : offres d’emploi, loisirs, échanges professionnels et sociaux, et services gratuits du quotidien. La plateforme limite les notifications pour réduire l’addiction numérique et encourage un usage équilibré, conforme au Digital Service Act, garantissant la protection des utilisateurs européens.

Toutes les données sont stockées en Europe et l’historique des publications est volontairement limité pour adopter un comportement éco-responsable et respectueux de l’environnement numérique.

Rejoindre Y EUROPE NETWORK, c’est faire le choix d’un réseau social européen, sûr, transparent et innovant, où liberté, responsabilité et engagement citoyen se rencontrent.

Name: UINSIDE
Description:
Uinside - the project is an original modern view of an old as the world problem. 

What makes humans happy? Can it be given or sold? How do they know they are happy? How do they find their way to happiness?

We think everyone has their own way and their own answers. But all these different paths sooner or later gather in some general directions. Using advanced data analysis methods, we want to see what those paths are. 

This research seems to give us an understanding of what people need to be happy. 

We don't insist on one right path, we just want to find a way to make that path smoother, more accessible, more pleasant, and more tangible. 

Right now we're making gaming apps that allow people to feel the path to happiness. To get curious about it.

-As a charity, you will be able to organize your marketing efforts on our portal with an opportunity to receive proceeds from our member community. Your portal is the starting point for our community to learn about your mission and service.

-Sponsors get to interact directly with our members as gifters of their products and services. They receive direct interaction with our members and exposure of their products and services through our free game play.

DollarZing is building a platform to help charities establish their identities and market their causes to our broader community members. Eventually, charities will be able to manage ZingCash donations and create campaigns to expand the reach of their impacts.

Name: QandR Live
Description:
QandR hosts live, interactive game shows on specific days. A typical show features 10 multiple-choice questions, each with four possible answers, and players have only 10 seconds to select one. After each question, the host reveals the correct answer, and the number of players who chose each response is displayed. To win, a player must answer all questions correctly; wrong answers result in the player losing points.


With various game styles, users have the opportunity to both learn and win. Before each competition, blockchain-based educational resources (specific crypto project sources or general sources about the crypto space) are shared with users. Studying these resources significantly increases their chances of winning. Participants can easily join competitions and receive their rewards by creating a unique profile and connecting through both Web3 wallets and Google accounts.

For companies, Q&R offers a unique marketing service by providing blockchain projects with the opportunity to present their resources to our users. This ensures that these resources are deeply understood by the community. By gaining detailed knowledge about the company, users open the door to a unique marketing strategy. All revenue generated from this service is awarded entirely to the users who win the competitions.

Name: QuestXR, Inc.
Description:
Imagine creating and playing immersive, story-driven, interconnected, live-action, adventures (a.k.a. Quests) anywhere, anytime – parks, museums, music and film festivals, sporting events, brand product launches, etc. – National Treasure meets escape rooms.  Challenges (e.g., puzzles, riddles, clues, etc.), which are the elements of the Quests, are delivered to the QuestXR or partner’s (SDK) mobile app via augmented reality, video, audio, images, and text.  Players can earn rewards as they negotiate and successfully complete the Quests.
 
Quests can range in complexity from simple scavenger hunts to MMORPGs, with built-in mechanics such as leveling, skills, skins, in-game currency, and player-owned digital items.  Players can create, grow, and accessorize cross-platform avatars usable, and re-usable, anywhere in the Metaverse.
 
Collected data will be used to engage players with daily rewards, limited time offers, and inform them of new Quests available near them, as well as provide metrics and marketing data to partners both on impressions and engagement.
 
QuestXR is a game studio and platform with a publishing strategy similar to Dungeons and Dragons.  The platform will serve as the game engine (analogous to D&D rule books) on which QuestXR will publish interconnected games (analogous to adventure books) both standalone and for our partners.  In addition, Game Masters (a.k.a. Dungeon Masters) can create their own adventures either using on-platform no-code tools or creating and uploading more sophisticated assets using Unity, UnReal Engine, Blippar, 8th Wall, etc.
 
We have a playable, one-person, at-home, POC – Mickey Lewis Casebook: The Case of Emily Hatch – which demonstrates how all the different kind of media can be woven into a narrative.

Description:
Bij Digitale Groepsspellen geloven we in de kracht van verbinding en plezier. We zijn een innovatieve speler in de wereld van digitaal entertainment en hebben één missie: mensen weer samenbrengen door middel van spellen. Met onze state-of-the-art digitale spellenbox bieden we een unieke en interactieve ervaring voor groepen van alle leeftijden.

Onze spellenbox is ontwikkeld met het oog op plezier, uitdaging en sociale interactie. Of het nu gaat om een gezellige avond met vrienden, een teambuildingactiviteit met collega's of een verjaardagsfeestje, onze spellenbox zorgt voor eindeloos vermaak en een onvergetelijke tijd.

We zijn trots op onze samenwerking met gerenommeerde partners, waaronder Landal Vakantieparken, waar we onze spellenbox introduceren om gasten een extra dimensie van plezier te bieden tijdens hun verblijf.

Bij Digitale Groepsspellen streven we naar innovatie en voortdurende verbetering. Ons getalenteerde team van ervaren ontwikkelaars en enthousiaste spelontwerpers werkt voortdurend aan het creëren van nieuwe spellen en het toevoegen van spannende functies aan onze spellenbox. We luisteren naar de wensen en feedback van onze spelers en streven ernaar om altijd te voldoen aan hun verwachtingen.

Sluit je aan bij onze groeiende community van spelers en ontdek de vreugde van samen spelen. Of je nu een doorgewinterde gamer bent of gewoon wilt genieten van quality time met vrienden en familie, Digitale Groepsspellen staat voor je klaar om een lach op je gezicht te toveren en nieuwe herinneringen te creëren.

Volg ons voor updates over nieuwe spellen, evenementen en inspiratie om jouw groepsspelervaring naar een hoger niveau te tillen. Samen kunnen we de wereld verbinden, één spel tegelijk!

Name: Kenz Chase
Description:
Kenz Chase is an innovative mobile game that blends adventure with technology, offering players a thrilling treasure hunt experience powered by Augmented Reality (AR) and geolocation. Whether you’re exploring public spaces, hotels, or tourist attractions, Kenz Chase guides players through hidden treasures waiting to be discovered in real-world locations.

Designed to keep users engaged, Kenz Chase uses AR to display interactive clues and directions on the player's screen, creating an immersive experience. The game allows for various levels of difficulty, encouraging players to challenge themselves while enjoying the excitement of discovery.

Beyond just gaming, Kenz Chase offers businesses a unique opportunity to engage their customers. Hotels, restaurants, tourist spots, and even events can integrate the game into their experiences, attracting more visitors while offering exciting promotions and rewards.

Our mission is to create a global treasure hunt that’s both fun and rewarding, using cutting-edge technology to turn every location into a playground. We aim to partner with companies in tourism, hospitality, and event management to enhance the customer experience and drive foot traffic through engaging, interactive experiences.

Join the chase, uncover the treasures, and be part of a community of explorers!
